user_comment: Amazing, cleverly thought through dress design. This dress is a very clever design. I debated between wearing the top as a halter or bringing it all to one side. Both cute. Wearing it all to one side, you kinda have to figure out best way to tie it. I wore it to the side and I added my own “scarf tie (not sure if the exact name of that accessory) and everyone complimented me on it. The fabric is kind of thin, but not so thin that I felt the need to wear a slip underneath (even though I did just because I might be slightly old fashioned). Even though the fabric was slightly thin, I loved the satiny, slightly shimmery look that really made it look classy. It also fell nicely in the skirt area and had a nice flow. Next time I might wear it as a halter top. :-) I did have it hemmed. I am 5’3” and even with high heels it almost hit the floor, so to not step on it while walking, it would need to be hemmed if you are my height or shorter. I wore with flats flats for a “sneaker ball”, so I definitely needed it hemmed.

SO Beautiful & Great Quality! I Love it! This dress is absolutely beautiful! I feel so gorgeous in it and better yet, it seems like excellent quality for a very fair, reasonable price! To start and as mentioned, the dress is wonderful quality.. the top fabric is sheer and has a light airy quality to it and the underlining is soft and keeps the dress from being see through. I wouldn’t wear black or bright colored undergarments under it but i had no issues with it being see through and it doesn’t require a slip. The lining does a great job showing off the top layer with the pattern too. The pattern is so pretty.. I absolutely love the gold dots on the white! So classy and elegant! Also the dress came looking perfect, no loose seams or threads and the stitching is done very well. The fit is really pretty and this fit true to size for me.. in fact it was the perfect fit despite my size going between XS and Small. I am 5’5 and about 120lbs so i wear XS to Small..I ordered a small.. some smalls can be a little baggy for me but this fit perfectly. There is a tie behind the neck that allows for a little adjustment.. I like that it ties instead of buttons, the tie looks nicer in my opinion and is much easier. This also has a beautiful style.. the top and sleeves are very complementing and the skirt flares out and flows beautifully. Overall i LOVE this dress! It’s so versatile too.. i can easily wear this for a casual look with a cute hat and sandals or add some sophisticated jewelry and heels for a more refined, formal look.. the possibilities with this are great! I absolutely recommend this! It’s gorgeous, well made, great materials and is very comfortable! Definitely worth the reasonable price!

A must buy! This dress is amazing! Between the lightweight fabric, and how comfortable it is...a perfect dress for any occasion...mine was mother of the bride! And it has pockets!!! The best thing you can give a woman wearing a dress is pockets! And you can't even tell when you've got a pocketful with your phone or keys, because of the way the dress is. And a sexy little slit! It also ties in the back like a corset, so you can adjust it however you want! Side note: I did step on it a few times, so thankful it didn't rip, and I was in 2.5 inch heels...so consider the length when you buy. I will be having mine hemmed up about 2 inches so I won't have to worry about it anymore. I'm 5'6 and 150lbs.
Beautiful Dress! This dress is amazing! Great quality, very flattering, and I got a lot of complements. I ordered a size M. I'm 5'3" 140 pounds for reference.

Beautiful dress. You will get lots of compliments! This dress is amazing! Has good built-in bra cups. I will say though that it is very long. Be ready for lots of compliments. It’s gorgeous.

Amazing dress!! This dress is amazing! I absolutely love this dress and I'm so glad I purchased it. It fits as it's described. I'm 5'4, size 12/14 (pear shaped) and the large fits perfect. The arms have some stretch to it and they didn't feel too tight. The bottom flows nicely and hits at the knees. The fabric doesn't feel cheap and it looks like a very expensive dress.

This dress is amazing! I am 4'10, 120lbs and 34DDD. I ordered a small and it fit perfect. This dress is so flattering. I am not in the best shape right now and have a little weight on me and you can't tell. It is flattering without making you look like you are a box. I have a full sleeve tattoo and wanted to cover it for a wedding so I wore the dress backwards so I could change the arm it covered. This is not the best pic of the dress but the only one that I could find to try and show the length etc. I will buy this dress in other colors. The quality is great!

Super flattering especially if you’re pregnant! This dress is AMAZING! I am 7 months pregnant, 5’2’’. This dress is magical! This dress is AMAZING! I bought it on a whim for fun for formal night on a cruise, choosing the champagne color because it was on sale and just hoping for the best. I was BLOWN AWAY when it arrived. I am 5'3" and ~130 pounds with 32G bra size, so fit can be difficult. The size 6 with the corset fit perfectly so I could adjust to my figure! I didn't even have to have it shortened once I added a hoop skirt and some heels. The champagne color was very pretty - more a pale yellow than the photo, but I won't argue with Belle vibes! I would note that in certain lighting, it came across as ivory and a number of people thought it was a wedding dress. The only thing I would caution is if you are buying a wire hoop skirt for underneath - at certain angles, you could see the wire hoops because the skirt is delicate. If I didn't have to pack it for travel, I may consider buying a different kind of underskirt that would have more layers for volume than wires. That said, even with the wire skirt, it was beautiful and I got lots of compliments and felt like a princess! :) Great find!

Flattering, works for pregnancy/nursing This dress is good quality. The fabric is nice. It is soft and comfortable and somewhat stretchy, and it’s thick enough that it doesn’t show every bump and lump underneath. It’s not at all see-through. The color is a little bit different than in the listing photos. It’s less neutral, and a little bit more camel colored and warm toned. It does run a little bit small in the chest and arms. If you’re normally in between sizes, size up. The length is midi length if you’re average height- it hits just below the knees on me (5’7”). The dress is also great for pregnancy and postpartum. It’s stretchy enough to fit comfortably even in the third trimester, and the crossover neckline is perfect for nursing moms. It is a little low-cut, but that’s easily solved with a camisole if it bothers you. The color is a little bit different than in the listing photos. It’s less neutral, and a little bit more camel colored and warm toned. It does run a little bit small in the chest and arms. If you’re normally in between sizes, size up. The length is midi length if you’re average height- it hits just below the knees on me (5’7”). The dress is also great for pregnancy and postpartum. It’s stretchy enough to fit comfortably even in the third trimester, and the crossover neckline is perfect for nursing moms. It is a little low-cut, but that’s easily solved with a camisole if it bothers you. And it drapes nicely over the tummy area, making flattering for anyone who is self-conscious about their midsection.

Overall I recommend it, and I only dropped one star because I did spend the price of the dress to alter it. But it's definitely an investment since I can't wait to rewear as many times as possible!

Gorgeous dress! This dress is gorgeous! The material is soft and good quality, the hi-low design moves beautifully and is very flattering. I love the elastic band around the middle, it’s very forgiving and gives you more options with sizing. I am 5’4” 125 lbs and wore a Small in the wine color and it was perfect. The color is true to the stock photo (it photographs a little lighter than it is in my pic). I did wear a slip under the dress because it’s just a tiny bit sheer depending on the lighting and was more for my own comfort than necessity. I personally prefer a modest dress that doesn’t need to be fussed with a lot so I added a tiny stitch to the closure at the bust to keep it from sliding around and it’s perfect! (If you know how to thread a needle you can have it done in 30 seconds. You’ll just have to be mindful that the stitch is there when putting on/taking off but it was no trouble) Yes, it did arrive wrinkled but you’re getting a dress in the mail…there’s no way for the company to prevent that from happening with this fabric. It ironed out easily and looks great! I’m not much of a dress girl but I will definitely re-wear this one and probably order other colors as well!

BUY IT!!! (May need to buy more than once for fit) This dress is GORGEOUS!! I will say I ordered the samd dress several times until I found one that fit me well. I ordered a small every time & each time it fit differently or the pattern was printed differently on the top (the beads were off-center & didn't cover all of the fabric evenly on the chest, for instance). I'm barely 5'0", about 107lbs, 34DD, & the small was at first too too long on the top. I'm used to hemming length & taking in straps on top, but this was just too big. Finding a smaller "small" helped a lot. For those who are bustier, this actually covered me well, but definitely wear pasties! I took up the top for more bust support & also slightly sewed the V at the bottom because I'm petite & it looked weird without cleavage. I also pinned the bottom because even in 3" heels I couldn't walk without holding it up/stepping on it. The back doesn't have a clasp/hooks above the zipper. I didn't have any problems with the zipper coming undone, but I threw extra pins in my purse thinking it might. I bought this dress for a black tie NYE event & got tonsss of compliments (I was surprised how many women actually went out of their way to compliment me)!! Buy it, try it, then go strut your stuff -- you can't help but feel glamorous & sexy in this dress!!

I have a smaller chest but larger thighs and booty. I wrote pasties just in case the girls briefly escaped, but they stayed in place very well! No undergarments were worn! I wore 8” heels and my dress very lightly brushed the ground. I’m 5’7” for reference. There’s absolutely NOTHING I can complain about! BUY IT! I plan on getting a few more colors! I also saw some women wearing the straps a bit different so it wasn’t a crossbody but just two traditional over the shoulder straps, but the way the dress is sewed, that didn’t work the best for me. It would be cool if there was a small hook-eye closure so you can go back and forth between the two styles but for the money, I can’t complain! I got compliments allllll night!

beautiful but fits tight This dress is incredibly beautiful. I love the floral pattern and the lightweight fabric; it feels high quality. I also like the ruffles. However, I don't think this dress was made for childbearing women. The bust is too high, made for perky tits that have never breastfed. The fabric has no give or stretch in it, so I could barely zip it up around my postpartum belly and nursing breasts. There are adjustable straps, but they don't adjust long enough for me. I had to wear a strapless, push-up bra to get my boobs to fit right in the dress. Even then, it is not a perfect fit. I am 125 lbs, 5'4" and 2 months postpartum, and I ordered small. I wish I ordered medium. I hope this dress fits me better as I lose more baby weight and stop nursing. It is still flattering nevertheless.

LOVE IT!!! This dress is IT folx! It's the perfect combo of sexy and classy, and is guaranteed to make heads turn. The rouching is so flattering, and this rose color is everything! Excellent dress for short woman This dress is it. I needed a dress for a wedding. I hate buying dresses. They never fit my 5’ 0 frame especially with the extra chunk I have going on after having a kid and too many lockdown snacks. I basically bought a whole bunch of colors in medium and large to see what fit. Oddly, the mediums fit in the long sleeve version and large fit in the short sleeve. The long sleeve dress is longer in the front. Idk why but it is. I personally went with the short sleeve ones Bc the long sleeve was a lot of fabric for my frame and made me look bigger, plus I live in Florida so it wouldn’t really have been practical. There is definitely variation in the size you get. Some were perfect, some a lil big. I’d rather have a lil bigger so I can alter if needed. The blue color was underwhelming so I returned. The green and brown (more camel) we’re my favorites. I also kept the black and the red polka dot. I made the red one a short sleeve dress. It does not come that way. For those saying it is too short you can certainly put it on inside out and pinch the sides of the skirt part into a small triangle and sew a little bit to take in and it will be longer.

You cant top this dress for the price This dress is not a light cheap dress. Its heavy and sturdy. No one belived I only paid what I did for it! It PULLS all of your belly in place with the corset top and is just so fluffy and pretty at the bottom. I will say be prepared to alter the bottom if you dont want it dragging the floor because it is long. Im 5'8 and still stepped on it a few times But I think thats to be expected with a wedding gown. I personally was more comfortable covering my shoulders with a bolero but did not need any sort of bra because its built into the dress. Saved time and money without having to find and learn how to wear a strapless bra! LOL my only complaint is it had an AWFUL fish market type smell when it arrived. I read on google it may be from a type of pesticide they use when shipping clothes over seas to keep from transporting any bugs but thats just a guess. I let the dress air out with some dryer sheets tucked in it and the smell was completely gone in maybe 3 days. Overall this dress is def worth it. You wont be disappointed. Get off the fence and get it.

For reference, I am 5'7, 185lbs, size 14 or L/XL and I got the XL.

So nice! This dress is really nice! It’s a satin but it is lined so while that adds some weight, it holds better structure and doesn’t cling- aka doesn’t not accentuate your insecure areas. For example I sometimes have a problem with dresses this style or satin because I’m insecure about my lower belly but this material does not cling around it. The dress is entirely held up by tying around your neck which makes me slightly nervous but I do like the open back so much especially the flattering droop under the waist. It is just above hitting the ground for me and I’m 5’5 but I think it’ll still look nice in heels because the leg slit breaks up the dress anyways so the length won’t look awkward.

Beautiful color/pattern! Good fit & has pockets! This dress is so pretty! I stumbled upon this color as I wasn’t too in love with the other patterns. Material is soft and thin (yet durable in quality). Dress has a little bit of stretch. I have an interesting body type and measurements. I’m tall 5’9”, long legs and torso. Small chest, I wear small size in my tops, average waist (waist size is a large SM and a small M depends on fit) and also With Large berthing hips. As you can see I literally fall into every sizing category for each body area. finding stuff that works perfectly for me never happens, so I give somewhere. I followed the sizing measurements given (not Amazon’s measurements) and ordered a M for it to fit my arms/Shoulders better and for my waist measurement. However this dress doesn’t fit me at my waist because of my long torso it’s it’s a couple inches higher, but that typical. I don’t mind where it hits me, that’s where stuff usually hits me. The length of this dress is great! I’m wearing a Victoria secret bra that is padded and pushes me up (overall bra gives me an added cup size) which helps fill the bust area out nicer. And this dress has pockets! Really can’t say enough about this. I don’t think you’ll be disappointed.

I followed the sizing measurements given (not Amazon’s measurements) and ordered a M for it to fit my arms/Shoulders better and for my waist measurement. However this dress doesn’t fit me at my waist because of my long torso it’s it’s a couple inches higher, but that typical. I don’t mind where it hits me, that’s where stuff usually hits me. The length of this dress is great! I’m wearing a Victoria secret bra that is padded and pushes me up (overall bra gives me an added cup size) which helps fill the bust area out nicer. And this dress has pockets! Really can’t say enough about this. I don’t think you’ll be disappointed.

This dress is the love of my life This dress is so pretty! I'm 5'9 around 260 lbs and ordered a size 26. Gorgeous! This dress is so pretty! It was lower in the front than advertised but you could pin it. It is long. I am 5'6" and wore 3.5 inch heels and it still almost touched the ground. Must have!

Gorgeous, comfy (usually these do not go together) flattering dress This dress is so pretty. It is soft and like wearing a comfy nightgown but looks AMAZING on. PERFECT holiday dress. I wore this dress to a women's event and got a ton of compliments. I live in South FL and the dress is a medium knit that was not too thick for FL heat of outside but perfect for the chilly cold of the a/c at the event. I would imagine it would work the other way around for most of the USA. The fit is nice in the sense that it is a stretchy dress. I have recently lost weight and needed to wear spanx type under garments bc I wanted/needed everything to be smooth. The sleeves are the real show stopper of this dress. The lace is both MODEST but not frumpy. Same for the length of the skirt (Im 5'10") and the neckline too. While being modest, this dress is also pretty sexy looking. My hubby said "va va voomy!" If you are considering this dress for a holiday party, church/house of worship event, or a hot date, this is the PERFECT dress for you!!

Stunning Dress! This dress is so pretty. The one shoulder and silky material made me feel so confident and sexy. I got the army green and absolutely loved the color. Charming and fun to wear semi-formal or casual dress This dress is so pretty. The Rust is slightly more vivid orange than photos show. It’s a beautiful color and compliments my pale skin tone, which is not easy. But the top is a bit roomy for me. I’m 5’7”, 115lbs, 34A, 27”Waist, 34”Hips and, other than the sort of baggy chest, the Small fits great. A good padded bra may remedy this, as I’m pretty flat in the chest department. I’d say this is definitely curve friendly. The pleated skirt flares out so gracefully and accentuates the hips in a good way. Unlike similar dresses, this has belt loops and comes with spare button for the cute keyhole back closure. Was not wrinkled on arrival and fabric is soft, silky, lightweight. No lining though. Super versatile. Can be paired with various shoes and accessories to suite any occasion from beach, casual, to formal. And so many colors to choose from. I may order one or two more, as this can be worn almost year round depending on color and outerwear. Very much recommend for any body type.

I Love, Love, LOVE this dress it is amazing! I received several compliments from men and women all night long! Lol. I got hit on, flirted with, etc. I am Not Single! Lol This dress is most definitely a head Turner! I was on the fence about purchasing, but it is the perfect little black dress to add to your closet! Okay, here are the deets, I'm 5 7" 194lbs, I usually wear a large, but in this case I'm glad I purchased the medium! The material does stretch but not too much, just enough to hug them curves! Lol. The arms weren't restricting and I didn't feel confined all night! I did wear a girdle just because of the curvature. If you're on the fence, I'd order. I'm glad I did! UPDATE: Came Back To Order Another In A Different Color For My Cruise!!

Perfect dress! This dress is the most comfortable dress I own.The fabric is silky and soft to touch. The material was thick enough and not see through at all. I will definitely be buying in more colors. I am a size 10, and my height is 5’9 and I bought a Large. Highly recommend !

ABSOLUTELY IN LOVE This dress is the perfect summer dress! I will be buying more colors pronto. My bra size is a 40G, so it is a little revealing, but I mean that’s to be expected. If you want you could definitely throw a tank top on underneath it. It was slightly longer than expected, but I am pretty short so it was not surprising.

prettiest thing i own This dress is the prettiest thing ive ever bought. I bought this dress in April 2021 for my prom so it took me a while to make this review, back then it only had 5 reviews and it was a huge gamble but im so so happy it turned out the way it did. I got expedited shipping and it came when it said it would. I got a size 8 in long burgundy and it was a little too long and also a little big in the bust so i got it hemmed. I'm also a 34C bust for reference. Although i did size up because im a little on the taller side and better safe than sorry as this was my prom dress. The tulle on the elastic part of the sleeves was also itchy but easily fixed with some fabric tape or sewing in some silk ribbon. Overall, there isn't a single place where you can find a dress like this, let alone this cheap. I really wanted the dress from the original designer teuta matoshi however it was $800 compared to this one for $80. clear choice for me. This dress was so pretty and surprisingly comfy and a FANTASTIC deal. Amazon really came through. Attached are some pics of me at prom
Get the Dress This dress is true to size and has a slight stretch. I am 5 ft and 195 lbs the dress was floor length on me. Once I put on the heels it was perfect.

Nice material but maybe too long. This dress is true to size. I am 5’6, 184lbs, usually wear a medium, and ordered a medium. The material is a nice stretchy soft sweater-like knit and feels great on. It’s not tight and has a lot of freedom of movement. What I don’t like is that it makes my legs look shorter with where the slit is placed and how long the rest is. I’m average height for a female, and can’t imagine anyone shorter than me wearing this dress. There should be a petite option. I tried it with a belt I had on hand just to see if it helps give it a little more style, so forgive me for showing it off with the wrong type of belt and shoes. I plan to wear it with a black belt, black knee high boots, some jewelry, and a cute black jacket. Despite the dress having an awkward length, I believe wearing it with tall boots will offset that look. It’s a very comfortable dress and I would recommend it if you’re tall enough.

Elegant dress This dress is truly a masterpiece, exuding a remarkable sense of design. Its shimmering silk-like texture adds an extra touch of elegance. What sets it apart is not just its aesthetics but also its practicality. The material is incredibly soft and doesn't compromise on thickness or transparency. It's a relief to know that it can be easily cared for as it can be machine-washed by cold water without any special requirements. The only minor preparation it needs is a quick ironing upon arrival to ensure a flawless appearance. One of the standout features for me is the ingenious design that allows for independent dressing. Despite the presence of a zipper and buttons at the back, I can effortlessly slip into the dress without needing someone else's assistance. This level of convenience is not commonly found in other dresses, making it a standout choice. Moreover, the thoughtful design ensures that there are no concerns about any potential light exposure, even with the exposed left arm and shoulder. The dress strikes a perfect balance between revealing and modest, creating an alluring and sophisticated look. The accuracy of the sizing is commendable. As someone who typically wears either an S or M, I opted for the M size for this dress, and it fits me flawlessly. Considering my height of 5ft 6in, the length is just right, falling neither too long nor too short. It accentuates my figure beautifully and complements my overall appearance. In conclusion, the dress combining impeccable design, luxurious fabric, and practicality. Its versatility in terms of independent dressing, coupled with its comfortable fit and suitable length, make it a wardrobe staple for any fashion-forward individual.

Va Va Voom! This dress is very Jessica Rabbit, wowza! I am wearing a size small and I am 5’3, 135 lbs. My measurements are 36D-27-36 and the dress had a nice fitted look. It hugged all of my curves beautifully. It has a zipper on the lower half of the dress and then a button closure around the neck. It was very easy to do it all by yourself. I love everything about this dress, from the open back to the sweetheart cut in the front. It was very flattering and gorgeous all the way around. Another cool thing is that the slit can be worn high or low depending on your preference with just a pull of a zipper. I love that it isn’t that noticeable either. The ruching in the front really brings in your waistline, creating a curvier look to your body frame. It is long for my height but with some super high heels, I think I can manage. Plus I don’t mind a little bit of drag on the floor, gives the dress a more elegant look. The material is thick and well made and does not require a slip. I would recommend it.

Good quality for a great price This dress is very light and airy which is exactly what I need to attend an outdoor gala in the Florida Keys. I will probably wear flesh toned spanks or slip just in case the skirt is see-through and I've included a shot of the bust area so you can see that while I'm wearing a black strapless bra, I'm pretty sure my bra doesn't show through. My measurements were almost exactly the 18w and it fits exactly, there is no stretch where the ribbon meets at the zipper. It fit a little higher waisted than I expected but I have a tummy and that is hidden by the skirt which had plenty of room for my hips. I usually prefer a more slinky look but I've gained weight and decided to go more modest and comfortable. I am 5'3 and there was about 2 inches on the floor, I feel pretty confident my shoes will take care of that. All in all, I'm very happy with my purchase.

Of course, I'm pretty thin and I got a size small but I have wide hips for my size and it's still roomy. I am 5'5" and the hem hit me just at the knees. The skirt tapers but still has room for a decent stride to walk. The quality is good. The fabric and craftsmanship doesn't look or feel cheap. The body of the dress is not lined but the fabric isn't too thin so as to be see-through. I feel like this style is elegant and perfect for attending a wedding or the like. It strikes me as a tad matronly for some reason but I'm not sure why. It's tailored enough that I suppose I could pull off a more youthful look with it but idk.

Very flowy, not too tight. Elegant. This dress is very unique once you are wearing it in person. The sleeves are completely detached from the body, not like a cape. They are very long strips of light fabric that are attractive but can be a tad annoying, too! The body of the dress is cut like a sheath dress but it's not tight or constrictive for the size imo. Of course, I'm pretty thin and I got a size small but I have wide hips for my size and it's still roomy. My measurements are around 33-25-36 and I had plenty of room to move through the chest, waist, and hips, almost too much but not so much so as to look dumpy. This dress is very versatile and affordable. I also find it very comfortable. I'm wearing it as a bridesmaid dress in a wedding, so it is a very affordable option. I'm very short 5ft 1in, and 127lbs. A small fit me perfectly, and even in length. Which I was a little afraid of at first. I strongly recommend this dress for any occasion. Great purchase.

Beautiful dress. This dress is very well made and the material is beautiful. It fit a tiny bit tighter than I expected but was still comfortable. I love the detailing under the bust and the side ruffle. The slit on the side is a little high but not indecent and would have been perfect for the semi formal wedding I bought it for. Sadly, I am just too short to pull off those sleeves. The ruffles are substantial and, I feel, they overwhelmed my frame. I am 5 ft tall and 154 lbs. If the sleeves were different, perhaps smaller ruffles, I'd keep the dress, but I'm going to send it back just because it does not suit my body. On a taller and, or thinner person, this is a stunning dress. Would recommend.

Beautiful dress. This dress is very well made and the material is beautiful. It fit a tiny bit tighter than I expected but was still comfortable. On a taller and, or thinner person, this is a stunning dress. Would recommend.

GORGEOUS, well-made, and got a TON of compliments! This dress is VERY well made. It is sheer but has a lining underneath which hides things (you can't see pantylines). If you are larger chested (I'm a B), you may need some support if they aren't perky. Otherwise the "off shoulder" part stayed put the whole time. I am super short (5 foot tall) so I had to have a tailor take about 5 inches off the bottom. I wore 4 inch heels for the "non sand" pic, and was barefoot in the other. The slit up the leg is perfect, too; it doesn't go too high or show too much leg; there is a LOT of flowy fabric. This dress would be PERFECT for a bridesmaid -- or even -- a bride! It can be dressed up with heels and jewelry (or a veil or flowers in the hair, etc.) or dressed down (no shoes, hair wild, etc. Just perfect and so gorgeous!

Beautiful dress! This dress is well made, flattering and detailed. I went to a wedding and received so compliments! My husband loved it too! I’m 5,2” and 125 lbs and ordered a size 6. The shoulder straps were a little long and kept falling off my shoulder, but I tightened the corset top and it seemed to hold. The length went to my ankles. Such a beautiful dress, thank you!

True to size This dress is well made. It fit perfectly. I ordered a medium. I’m 5’4 and 152lbs. Not see through and just enough stretch for comfort. With it being strapless, It stayed in place the whole night.

Stunning and well made! This dress is well-made and fits perfectly! I am about 5’8 and a size 10-12 right now. The large fits amazing. The top lace has just the right amount of stretch to be comfortable and flattering. I LOVE this dress!

This dress is well-made with high-quality materials. It's true to size and the fabric is soft and stretchy, so it fits comfortably and is flattering. The seams are solid, and the jewels feel like they're securely fastened. I have yet to wash it so I can't comment on the longevity--if something goes wrong in the wash, I'll update the review. I'm 5'11, 150 lbs and the size 10 fit perfectly. Great dress for an opera or a fancy gala. Made me feel very beautiful and elegant. :)

Great Dress, Very Versatile This dress is wonderful. I needed a black dress for a funeral and bought this one after reading all the reviews. This is perfect because I can dress it up a bit for the funeral but versatile enough that I can wear it casually with sneakers to work or wherever else. The material feels nice- not necessarily “heavy,” but you can tell it’s not going to rip if it catches on a doorknob or whatever else. I am 5’7”, 185lbs, and ordered a medium so it would be slightly more fitted, but sizing up to a large for a more casual look would have worked well too.
20/10!! ✨💅 This dress is worth it!! I am 5’1 and 170lbs! I got a size Large. This dress is Very stretchy and comfortable. This dress made me feel elegant and beautiful.

Cheap yet Classy Bridesmaid Dress This dress isn’t without flaws, but for the price and the occasion it was PERFECT. The cowl of the neckline doesn’t lay symmetrically, it doesn’t release wrinkles easily, the seams pucker instead of being perfectly flat (an issue with this fabric, I find it is like that with more expensive brands also). The light colors are sheer, they stain easily. That said, we wore them as bridesmaids dresses for a Vegas wedding and they look fantastic in pictures, have just enough stretch, and the fabric drapes nicely. I am 5’6” 155lbs 39” bust 28” waist 40” hips and the small fit perfectly. The dress landed around my knees and the slit came pretty high but it didn’t look bad.

Need it in every color This dress kicks so much ass. I'm 5'9", 140 lbs, wear a medium. I work at a funeral home and have gotten this dress in multiple colors and paired it with a cream cardigan on cool days. I get compliments on it constantly and it's actually incredibly comfortable for a dress. Has a lot of give and is a good fit/length. I want every single color!

Absolutely Gorgeous! This dress Ladies is it!! I'm 5'8 280. Although the dress in the pic is not what I received, I got the dress in the second pic. I received soooo many compliments. The dress is stretchy and flows. I'm tall so it didn't drag on the floor but it almost touched the ground in the back and shorter in the front. I bought it for a formal 40th bday party. I want to try other colors!!💕

This dress leaves you subject to your figure (or your spanx). It's not flattering at all. I feel it didn't flow widely from the hips like it looks on the image. I thought it would open into a flowing skirt from the hips (A-line style), but it sticks to your body all the way down, until maybe the knee. And I dont think it was a wrong size because I sized up and everywhere else it felt loose enough or even too loose. The fabric is synthetic, very stretchy and thin, which I think is what doesn't help smooth your figure since it has 0 compression or thickness to hide imperfections, but it is of course comfortable if that's what you seek. The knot in the waist is a redeeming quality since it does camouflage a belly. I didn't have very high expectations, I bought for a barbie-themed party. The shiny fabric was nice, the contrast of the gold and purple sort of iridescent shimmer was also very pretty and would have been perfect for my party. But it just looked terrible on my body, even with shapewear. The length was midi. I am 5'4" and it hit between mid-calf and ankle. [I was not going to upload pics because I really dont like how I look, plus my niece drew all over the mirror, but I guess you had to judge for yourself whether it's what you want]. Pictured: Size XXL 45" bust 40" waist 49" hips 215 lbs 5'4" height

Ugh, chest opening! This dress looked cute and while I am bigger than the model (size 12 bottom/14 top, 38DD, 5'3 height), I was hoping it would look well. PROS: Dress has a long back zipper, stitching is well done, the material is great, I think it fits well and I was told it looked sexy. CON: Off of the left shoulder, there is a slight shoulder opening which is part of the design, however, as a result of this, the "crossover wrap" around the chest is not closed. This creates a weird "opening/bulge" on my left breast (see photos). This may not be a problem if you have smaller breasts, but at 38DD, this is a problem. I'd say a bigger size may work but if you look at the pictures, the dress is already slightly lose on the back and hips. Overall, great design but not for a large chest with smaller waist.

Sexy and Elegant This dress looked great on me. It showed more leg than I wanted. I ordered a size Large. I am 2 months postpartum so im not quite sure what my actual size is, but I believe I could have gone up a size. I weigh 207lbs, and typically can fit a large/ XL. The material is very thin, and sheer. I didn’t like how high the front of the dress is, thankfully the wind did not blow it up, so my undergarments didn’t show. Overall it’s a beautiful dress, you will turn heads, because it’s just that cute.

No shape/ matron like dress This dress looked great on the model but after trying it on my mid sized 5’7 body I did not feel confident. I bought this dress to wear as a wedding guest but it made me feel older or matronly. I did not feel that it gave me any shape and the lace overlay felt cheap. I did like how the dress had a v shape in the back but overall not a great buy for a young person.

Gorgeous floor-length dress, fits well depending on body type This dress looked so beautiful online, and I still do love it in person. The color was indeed wine-y but with a slight purple to it. The bottom zips up right above the hips and the rest truly is tightened by the lace up bodice on the back, so make sure you have someone to lace you up. I ordered a 14, which is usually what I am wearing these days. It fit a little tight at the zipper but a little looser than desired on the top. The material is not stretchy and is very high quality evening gown material, so the dress cannot actually be tightened at the bodice or it will bunch up and not fall right. So if you are busty, I would say you are good for this fit. But if your weight is more in your waist or belly, the proportions may not flatter your particular body type. The dress shape, material and color were gorgeous though, and it is floor length even with heels (I'm 5'7"), so is a real showstopper.

Beautiful dress! This dress made me feel beautiful, 30 weeks pregnant here so it is definitely bump friendly! Beautiful Date Night Dress This dress made my husband say WOW! I purchased it for my brother's wedding but decided it was not appropriate for what I was going for. This is the perfect date night or out-on-the-town dress! I'm 5'4" about 135-140 lbs.

Bump friendly lightweight dress This dress made room for my 21 week bump perfectly. Other than that it is just ok. I would say the model images are not realistic as the fabric is thinner than it looks, drapes loosely and does not lay or gather anything like the seller shows. There are also seaming issues that lessen the quality. I can see this being a nice option for professional photos since the camera likely wouldn’t pick up those details, but not quite suitable for a formal event. True to size though and workable with heels at 5’2”. The pink color is awful, green is better. I would need to get creative with the neckline (did not clip the manufacturer tack since I wasn’t keeping it).

This dress makes me feel Anita in a community theatre production of West Side Story: there's something costumey about it, which might be suitable for prom or other formal occasion. It's surprisingly comfortable and easy to wear, and the slit is modest. The dress is stretch and runs large. You do need to have an ample bosom or padded pushup bra to fill the bodice. For reference, I'm 5'8", 120 lbs, 34A+ bust, 26 waist, 35 hip, 33" inseam and ordered a small. I need to have it taken for a proper fit, but could probably wear it as-is if I pin the décolletage closed and wear the right undergarments. Perhaps because it's such an attention-getter I'll have it altered. The fabric is stretchy and I wouldn't attempt it myself with my limited sewing skills. It's festive and forgiving. High fashion types might look down upon it, so know your audience.

I am 5’3 , 132lbs , 36D and curvy at the waist and it’s super flattering and stretchy - I was debating medium but it would have been too big but the stretch gives some room even if you may be in between sizes . Stunning! I felt like a Queen in this dress! This dress makes me feel like a Queen! Even my uncle told me he thought I looked like a Queen! It’s so beautiful, elegant, sexy, and sophisticated. Simple yet a showstopper! I wore it to my mom’s 85th birthday party and got tons of compliments! You have to be in great shape to wear it. Sorry but it’s the truth! I’m 53 but I have exercised, taken care of myself and eaten healthy for over 20 years. Although the material is not too thin, it still has spandex in it, and it’s VERY fitting. So you need to either be in great shape or be SUPREMELY confident because it WILL show every single curve and/or other thing you may or may not feel comfortable with. I happen to love it on me. I didn’t wear a bra because the back is a little too low for a strapless and there isn’t enough support in the bodice to hold a pair of adhesive “chicken cutlets” (LOL), as I call them! But it’s a black dress so I wasn’t worried about the “girls” being loose or the nips making an appearance! For reference, I’m 5’7”, 126 lbs., 34C-27-37, and I ordered a Small. It fit me perfectly because I wear a small size in pretty much everything. I say buy it! It’s very glamorous. Considering I paid so little for it, I felt like it was a red carpet-worthy dress!

Comfortable and Flattering This dress seems to be made very well. I found no areas with odd bunching, loose threads, or uneven seams. The material is also a nice thickness with enough stretch to be quite forgiving, and the zipper works flawlessly every time, even when I’m zipping it up and down by myself. I got this dress in green, and it’s a lovely, dark shade that’s elegant rather than bland. The design is slimming and sexy (those were the first things my husband said when I tried it on), feels extremely comfortable to wear, and isn’t constrictive when I move. The neckline is flattering, and the slit is intriguing since it isn’t the typical side style. I’m short, so I had some concerns about how that would land on me. It isn’t too high, but it shows more of my aging thighs than I like, so I’ll need to wear pantyhose. That isn’t typically something I like, but it’s an easy concession to make for this dress. Regarding fit, I’m 5’3” and typically wear anywhere from a U.S. size 4 to 8, depending on the brand and cut of the clothing. I followed the size chart to order a medium, and it fits perfectly. I seriously love everything about this dress. I can’t recommend it enough.

This dress snatches me in all the right places! I'm 5'2", 150 lbs, and typically wear size 6-8 in jeans. As a petite, curvy woman with broad shoulders and a larger chest, this dress is incredibly flattering, even without much of a booty. Highly recommend for busty ladies seeking a flattering fit!

Lovely surprise This dress surprised me in a few ways. I have super low expectations when it comes to Amazon clothing. This isn’t the best quality, it feels like cheap polyester that so many Amazon clothes do. But it doesn’t LOOK cheap. The design and pattern make the dress appear much nicer than it really is. It’s also extremely flattering. In this photo, I’m 180lbs (5’5”) and I have a significant mom pouch from 2 c-sections. I immediately felt very confident in my appearance upon trying this on. The front of the dress has a snap closure which makes it nursing friendly. Given the extreme lightweight polyester fabric, this skirt will fly up at the slightest breeze, so just something to keep in mind given how short the length is. I wore something similar (also from Amazon) to an outdoor wedding last fall and I spent the majority of my time trying to hold down my skirt. Overall, I highly recommended this for a quick and inexpensive outfit!

Beyond beautiful & long enough for tall girls! This dress was everything I needed for my glamorous Christmas photos with my babies. I am a T-shirt and leggings/jeans type of girl, so I was really worried that none of them would be flattering or comfortable enough. I won’t lie, I loved every single dress that I ordered off Amazon. The quality was great, but we’re here to talk about this one. The one that I chose at the end of the day. It’s very stretchy and comfortable. The slit up the side is just sexy enough to keep you from showing off too much But still make you look like one hot mama. I wore a body shaper that’s basically like underwear that goes all the way up to the bottom of your bra because I didn’t want it to show through this fabric. It is thick and made really well but I knew that if I got anything like a corset style or anything super thick it would show through the dress for sure. some of you may not need that extra Shapeware but after two kids this mom needed just a little smoothing as it kind of shows all curves. Anyway, as far as length, it was almost too long, even with 6 inch heels and I am around 5’7”-5’8”ish without the heels. That’s one thing I loved about it because long dresses are usually too short on me. I also got these beautiful sparkly rhinestone heels off Amazon and they went beautifully with this dress. At the end of the day I highly recommend this dress as it’s really great quality, has a great stretch, really comfortable and so damn sexy!

Exactly what I was looking for! This dress was everything that I was looking for! Do I love it? Yes! Would I recommend it? Absolutely! Would I buy another one? Probably not. For reference, I am 5'5, about 165-170lbs, and a 36D in cup size. Much of my weight is on my behind, love handles, and stomach area. This dress material is thick. I never had an issue with the zipper, as others had stated. However, I did forewarn my husband to please be careful because of the reviews. I was wearing a skim underneath, which helped tremendously! The dress did not have a foul smell; everything was sewn perfectly, and the length was exactly what I wanted. The cons- I do not consider this dress to be of "bandage" type material. It is much stretchier than the actual bandage type. The halter piece is exceptionally long, and because of the fabric, it is stretchy. I would like to see something that supports my girls more. An XL might have been a better option for my torso and down, but not my bust area. So, I think the L was an "okay" choice, too. Lastly, I was wearing a bra, and in other pictures, you can see the lines through the dress, which I was not happy with. The pros- I love the assortment of colors the seller offers because finding a maroon-colored dress that matched my college color was challenging. Seeing that it was stretchy, it was easy to move in, but I disliked the bust area so much. It was bigger in that area. Overall, it is a beautiful dress, and I love my pictures. However, if the dress was more "bandage" than stretchy, better made for the bust area, and the halter piece was stronger, I may have given the dress a 5 star rating.

If you are comfortable with a tight, form fitting dress stay true to your normal sizing, otherwise size up for a less tight fit. The material isn’t very thick, so I would definitely recommend spanx or some shape-wear so your underwear lines and any imperfections are maintained. I will definitely keep this in my cashe of gowns.

So Beautiful and Flowy! This Grace Karin dress is so beautiful and flowy for spring and summer! I got the size small (I'm 5'6" and 120 pounds, size 4) so it fits me very well. The fabric is comfortable and breathable, making it ideal for spring and summer weather. It looks flattering on me. The only thing I would change is that I wish the elastic band was just under the bust and not further down because it leaves a little extra fabric under the bust. I'm small chested (34A) so women with larger busts may not have that issue. It washes well and I love the tiered layers. The fabric is thick enough that you don't have to wear a slip underneath. Very happy with this dress!

Very THIN, but modest length and neckline This green maxi dress is flat out gorgeous. Based on the ad images, which I examined closely before purchasing, I was expecting this dress to be less sheer than it is. That is my only concern. The material is silky, with permanent accordian plates throughout, and moves beautifully. The split is visible, and if you prefer modesty, it can easily be pinned or a straight stitch or tacking, to minimize the amount of split. The neckline is high, slightly scooped and rounded. The back closes with one button at the top, but my 2 models just slipped their head through. This is pictured on one model who is 5' 9" tall and 200lbs. The other is 5' 2" and about 175/180lbs. The beginning of the split starts much lower on the shorter person. There's a satin trim on the inside of hem around neckline. There's a simple stitch at the bottom hem of dress (pictured)-its not very attractive, but not overly visible. The neckline button is a clear faux "crystal" plastic button. No pockets. You will absolutely need to wear a dark slip underneath the green dress to be modest, unless see-thru is desired. I would say this would be a great formal gathering dress, or mother of the bride etc. As of 6/15/2024, this beautiful dress is about 48 dollars, which is a good value. *Please view pictures and any video as I consider them part of my full review.

Ooooooo Mamacita! Finally got my "Lady in Red" dress :) This has really high quality construction and high-end fabric. It feels substantial and well made and OOOOoooo La La! Smokin' hawt. I am 5'1" (in flats) and 115 lbs. Bust 36, Waist 27, Hips 37. I wear a 34 E/F bra. I ordered the small. This thing FITS ME LIKE A CUSTOM GLOVE. I'm headed over to the seller's (OWIN) store to see what else they have because this is really quite impressive. The V neck is deep but it doesn't gap open. You can see my bra peeking through in one of the photos. That doesn't especially bother me as I plan to wear an appropriate black bra beneath it. The fabric is smooth and soft, and not shiny. It looks expensive. It moves with you without losing shape. If you have a little tummy I think the ruching is going to flatter your curves. I like that the ruching is well-constructed and doesn't add any bulk at all. My tummy looks flat. Sometimes you never know what "wine red" is going to mean, right?, but I can say it is pretty much true to the color as pictured by the seller. As I sit here looking at my can of Dr. Pepper, it's kind of like that, or a dark cranberry? Anyways, it's VERY pretty. The zipper in back is classy, well stitched and smooth to operate, I had no trouble zipping myself. If the quality of the white fabric is the same as this red one I doubt very much it would be see through at all. I might have to buy a white one because that would be just knock-out gorgeous for summer. Love this thing. Can't wait for my husband to see it., but I'm wondering if I should buy a taser first, lol. :D

I'm in Love with this dress! This is a beautiful AND comfortable maxi dress. The pockets make it a 5 Star Bestseller in my book. The split v-neck is ideal for either showing a little cleavage or if you are a nursing mama, this would work great. I am larger busted and the smocked gathering fir directly beneath my bust, making for a comfortable and natural delineation. The lace at the bottom can be easily dressed up with a cute pair of heels or wedges. I can also see myself throwing on a pair of flip-flops and heading toward the store. The arm sleeves are adorable and loose with a fluttery look. I did tighten the string in the back a bit and it did help lend a more modest neckline, but if I feel like I need to cover up more, then I will just throw a layering tank underneath. This is a very long maxi, I'm 5'6 and the bottom rested on the top of my feet. I'm gonna try it with a skinny belt and kind of a blousing action to see how it looks to give me a little more wiggle room to wear with flatter shoe wear. The pockets are a great size to hold a multitude of items from phone, to keys, to whatever. This is a very figure flattering and beautiful dress. I would highly recommend to anyone 5'6 or taller - any shorter and you will probably have to have it hemmed.

Beautiful dress at a low cost!!! This is a beautiful dress and a deal for the price!!! Looks expensive. Hugs all the right areas and hides the problem areas. I just wish the top was a lighter color because I am hoping to wear to an outdoor wedding. I am 5'6 and it goes to the floor. I could still wear flats or heels. It is the perfect combination of formal/casual depending on your occasion. Could be dressed up or played down.

I was told this dress was made for me! This is a beautiful dress and fit so well!! This dress wasn’t too tight or too loose. I loved the details of the beads on the sleeves. I got a L, I wear a 10 in most jeans. I’m about 5”2 and did have to get a couple inches altered off. I’d recommend wearing your hair up, otherwise it will snag. 10/10!

Beautiful Dress!!! This is a beautiful dress love the color and it fits me like a glove. I ordered the color Buff /short sleeve, in size 8 I’m 5’5 132 lbs bust 34 and the fit was perfect the only alteration it needed was the hem. When I tried it on my husband said WOW it looks like it was made for you. It was very comfortable to wear all night the lining and lace is soft and the color will go well with all skin color. I walked my youngest brother down the aisle at his wedding and received lots of compliments on the dress.

Gives a great hourglass shape; runs a little big This is a beautiful dress that is versatile and can be wore on so many different occasions. The length and style are modest yet still very stylish. To me, the ruffles at the sleeves and chest and the overall cut give it a classy 1940's vibe. The length falls just below my knees which shows some skin but not too much. The style is an A line cut which is fitted in the waist and then flares out through the bottom. The flare helps camouflage the lower stomach area but still accentuates the waist. It has a crew cut neck and small ruffles at the arm. Again, showing just the right amount of skin to still stay modest. The overall sizing does run a little large. The small was a little large in the bust and waist on me but it was still wearable and looked good. If they had an extra small it likely would have fit me perfectly. I am 5'5" 118lbs measurements 34-25-38. If you see in the last picture the waist has about an extra 2 inches of extra fabric on me. The bust is a tad large as well. But it's really not noticeable in the black dress and I imagine the style isn't meant to be skin tight either. I was also surprised at the quality of the fabric, it's got a good thickness to it and I would imagine even in lighter colors it would not be see through. This is a really stylish, well made dress that looks especially flattering on people with curves. And on people who don't have alot of curves, the flared a-line cut helps give the appearance of a more hour glass shaped figure. Very stylish !

Beautiful But Way Too Big This is a beautiful dress that looks and feels well made. The combination of the colors and the way they blend together is really gorgeous. I found that a few sequins fell off but nothing major and that is pretty standard for a sequin dress. The dress is lined well so that you don't feel irritated by the sequins. Unfortunately, this dress was just too big and a bit too short on me. I will need to take it in. I cannot even keep it up on my shoulders and the waist is huge. I ordered the Small and I am 5'10, 118 lbs, 32 A/B-25-34 for reference. As you can see from the photos, when I pull this tight in the waist and let the shoulders drop, this dress really moves up a notch. I think I will alter it like this.

Order slightly larger. This is a beautiful dress with quality material. I am 5’3” and 160 lbs and wear a 14 so I ordered one 12-14 and one 16 just to have an option. The 12-14 (L) fit snugly which, if I didn’t have a belly would prob have been ok with some shapewear, but the 16 (XL) looked so much nicer. It is a little roomy but I liked the way it looked. It was 6 inches too long (so was the size 12-14 one!). Another girl had written that she just cut it off at the bottom! So that is what I did. I marked 6” from the bottom all the way accross the front from seam to seam and cut it off with a sharp pair of scissors and then just tapered it and left the back as is. I did the same with the black overlay. I think it looks fine! It is so flowing and falls in grooves that you can’t even tell (unless you are looking really close) and who’s gonna be doing that! I am very happy with my purchase.

Beautiful dress! 100% recommended. This is a beautiful dress, and I am so pleased with it. It fit just as expected. I bought a large as a 5'5", 152 lbs woman. I wore it for my second set of engagement photos (thanks, COVID!), and it was so flattering. The photographer commented on how it had great movement for the camera. It's even beautiful enough to wear as a beach dress, but I had already bought a wedding dress before finding this one. I have a couple more colors saved to my list that I hope to purchase down the road. I've only worn it once so far, but I haven't found any flaws yet. If you have this in your cart, buy it!

Good quality This is a beautiful dress, the color is a dusty rose. Looks expensive, very elegant , classy and feminine. I am 5.4’ , 126 pounds, 36C . I bought size 6 because I need extra room for my 40’ hips and tights. Love the shoulder cup and neckline. Received lots of compliments ❤️

This is a beautiful dress, they actually sent me the wrong one ... This is a beautiful dress, they actually sent me the wrong one initially (it had ruffles) but this one is more of a classic design. I really like it except for the fact that it's too big on top. I got a small and I'm 5'5 and 110 lbs, it's snug on the bottom but not in a bad way and makes sense because I'm a slight pear shape. You can't really see it in the pics but the top gapes out and it's just too big. If it were tighter I'd keep the dress. the dress is a dark blue but in certain lighting it's a brighter blue. This dress does a great job of holding you in without making you feel like you're a sardine! The quality of the dress material is great and I did not notice and loose strings on it. The zipper works great and there is a slit in the back so you can easily walk in it. There is a slight gathering of the material in the front of the dress which is very flattering and makes the dress have a bit of movement to it. Overall really nice dress and a good price. I would highly recommend to anyone who thinks they can fill out the top portion.

Has some stretch at the waist! This is a beautiful dress! So well made, even has a bit of a stretch at the middle. I didn’t try it on until just before the wedding, but l think l could have gone down a size if l had had the time to order. I am 5’4” and as you can see it’s a bit long, but it looked beautiful and didn’t wrinkle all day. Hand wash. Excited to find an occasion to wear it again!

Flowy and Flattering This is a beautiful dress! The style is flattering, neckline not too low, and the fabric flows nicely. The white is a soft white which pairs well with the metallic gold dots. My nude undergarments did not show through. The XL fit perfectly and I am 5'5" with a 44" bust, 38" waist, and 43.5" hips, and I am currently 8 months postpartum. It goes down to my upper ankle.

Great dress This is a beautiful dress. I receive many compliments when I wore it for a wedding. I ordered it expedited and received it on time. I am 5’8”, 188 lbs so I bought the XL. I did not realize that the dress was see-through and the cups that cover the breast showed through, so I took out the fabric cups and put a black bodysuit underneath which worked very well. The top part is snug and doesn’t have much give, but that works because it helps keep the breast from sagging. The dress is shorter in the front and longer than I expected in the back but it was very nice-a lot of fabric. I did not take it to the cleaners but I was able to iron it without a problem. You definitely need to wear high heels because of how long the dress is. The dress doesn’t look cheap, but is constructed very well. Lastly, you will need help tightening the dress up in the back because it’s corset style. You won’t be disappointed if you buy this dress.

Just as pictured This is a beautiful dress. The material is nice and the fit was perfect. For reference, I bought this for my very petite daughter. She is 5’1” and weighs 96lbs. It is longer on her than what is pictured on the model but that was expected. Great purchase!

Ran quite large, odd cups This is a beautiful gown in person, but I think it could be a highly returned item due to sizing, and the fact that the sewn in foam pads are incredibly unflattering – a very low/rounded effect, rather than pushing or perking up. Plus, there's just too much pad. I'm a 35 bust and a 30 waist, putting me on the high end of a large, and there was excess to gather at the waist and especially up top. Since there is no boning, but the fabric is thick, I'd recommend going to the lower end of the size range and hoping the dress fits tightly (with shapewear underneath). You can also see from the ad that the design in the front doesn't really match up. That didn't bother me until I saw it on in person, which changed the experience as well.

Super cute This is a beautiful jumpsuit. It is metalic in color and very light weight. It is definitely for taller ladies, I had to get it altered (5’1” here) but that is pretty normal for me. 😂 Emerald City vibes!😃🌈🧙🏻‍♀️
Stunning This is a beautiful party dress. Great for a school dance, opera, party. Bought for a 14 year old. Loved it. Sequin is a shimmery pink. Tulle shirt.

Beautiful silk shirt 🤍 This is a beautiful silk shirt. It is elegant and businesslike attire. I ordered me a xs and I do find it being a little on the larger side. I like my clothes a little more body fitted but this one comes more loose. For size reference, I am 5’2 & 100lbs. The color is a very beautiful gray- blue. Nice material, lightweight and thin, but not see thru. Great to wear for an evening out to dinner or business casual wear.

Beautiful dress This is a beautiful, classy dress. The velvet is nice and soft. The sparkles add a bit of something extra but it's not over the top. The flutter sleeves are fun. The bottom is flowy. The material is a little on the heavier side but that's to be expected but it's not too heavy. The zipper is a bit stiff. I had to have my husband zip it up because I could reach it but it was too stiff to pull up. My advice is to go with your regular size. I am 5'2" 120 lbs. and according to their sizing chart I would fit a L so that is what I got. It is a little baggy so I could have ordered my normal size of M.

Perfect Wedding Guest Dress This is a beautiful, formal dress that would be perfect for a wedding as a guest! I am 5'4, 160lbs, and a 34C bust, and the large fits me perfectly. I usually wear a medium in dresses, but I wanted to ensure that this was not skin tight, so I recommend going up a size if you do not want this dress to be body con. I love the fact that this has an open back and it has two strings to tie or let go on the side. The bust has a deep-v but does not reveal too much. The dress does not have a slit on the side, but it is easy to get on and off by lifting it up since it does go all the way down to the floor. There is a zipper on the side as well to make it easy to get on and off. I like how it didn't show my sweat as I was getting down on the dance floor and I really liked how it has a flowy bottom so you have room to move your feet.

But overall a cute dress; thick material and overall fantastic quality. Wore it to a wedding and everyone liked it.
Nice This is a cute dress but requires styling to truly be chic. I’m 5ft 154 lbs and the small fit perfect

This is a cute dress that looks just like the pictures. I got it to wear to casual events. I'm 5' 6", 38D, 35" waist, 45" hips, and I usually wear a L or XL. According to the size chart, I'm an XL, and that's the size I've ordered. The dress fits me nicely, and it's very flattering overall. The straps are adjustable, and the back of the dress is stretchy. Double layer dress This is a cute dress that may or may not be a good option for me. I'm not sure it is very flattering on anybody, at least it doesn't look the best on me, probably because for this type of dress and my type of body, you need some sort of shapewear under. The fit of this dress is tight, specially around the midsection. But I appreciate that it is double layered, because that gives you some tummy control. I found this dress to be longer than it looks on the model photos, on my 5'6" height, the dress goes a few inches above the knee. My favorite part is the off the shoulder detail on one side, I think it is really cute. I have to try this dress again with some shapewear to see it convinces me to wear it, specially for the price. Another thing to notice is the weight, probably because of the knit fabric used on the making of this dress and since it is ruched, it needs more material.

Cute, Complimentary Dress This is a cute dress. It's light and flowy and it cinches in a complimentary spot. Will be great to wear in an office setting. It fits true to size. For size reference I'm 5'4, 170lbs
Cute dress This is a cute easy dress. It fits true to size. I am 5'7" and length is great. Fabric is lightweight and comfortable. Skirt has flowy details that add to style.

Great little dress for the price This is a cute little dress for the price. Fits me longer than the picture, but I am 5'1. I bought this when I was about 135 lbs, and I didn't feel like it was flattering (in medium or small), but I really liked the style of the dress, so after I lost some weight, I rebought it hoping I would like it ,and I definitely do! The tie off accents the waist but it will also accent the size of the girls (and IMO makes them look bigger than what they are!) For reference, I am 5'1, 119 lbs, 34-25-35.

This is a cute summer dress. The fabric is fairly thin, not see-through, it’s just going to show every line/bump. Overall, it’s flattering and comfortable but is definitely not something I would wear in a super formal setting, due to the fabric. This is something I would wear to a more casual dinner/date night (if I got a color other than black, I might were it elsewhere too). The tie along the back was easy to figure out and put together. I seems to wrinkle fairly easily. (For reference: I am 5’5”, 120lbs — I got a size small, which I think fits well)

I'll have it in all colors 😏 This is a definite yes...love the color and fit. I'm 5'1" 175lbs and I have a size M. I'll be purchasing more dresses like these soon and will wear them on my IG @Collins2Collins

slinky, stretchy and smooth! This is a fabulous dress! The fit is not only perfect on my 42-32-40 figure, the back is high enough and the front is cut so that I can wear a proper strapless bra and be covered up, supported, and still look terrific! The colour is such that you could wear with black or apricot/beige tights, the sparkles are fun, and the material is slinky and stretchy, reminiscent of the acetate of the 90s but in a modern style. The off-the-shoulder sleeves, with the cute feathers (watch out for those, they may make you sneeze) ensure that there is no bulging under the arms, which is a fantastic addition. The ruched front is slimming and the back clings in a flattering way without being too tight. The zipper slit is a great idea if you need modesty or just a little more room to walk. The latter is the only key proviso we'd mention. I'm 5'7" and have a 32" inseam. I'm wearing 6" platform heels in these photos. If you're under 5'7" or have lower heels, you may want to get these dress hemmed. Even so, it would be worth it. 5 stars!

Flattering, and a bargain This is a fairly simple but elegant stretch-velvet cocktail dress that hits all the right marks. The stretch fabric means it's more forgiving on different types of figures, but the fit generally is true to size. (It's being worn here by my 5'6" daughter who normally wears a size 2--this dress is the Small.) It also moves well, and doesn't ride up when seated. There is a kind of slip/apron under the ruffles at the front, so that neither the wearer (nor anyone looking at them) will be surprised by unexpected gaping.

Rave Worthy - For One Use This is a gorgeous and unique dress, my daughter got nothing but compliments when she wore it for her Prom. She loved the comfort for movement and the soft lining. However, I am glad I didn't pay anymore than what I did as it is only a one-time use. By the end of the night it was so stretched out up top that it didn't lay right anymore, was bagging up on the shoulders and kept falling down in the chest area. And the material snagged and pilled badly on the front just from wearing her seat belt. So, if you need a dress for a one time event, this is fantastic and will get you solid raves. Also, I'm glad something told me to opt for the Large size after reading other reviews. Going by the measurement chart, she would have needed a Small as she does in most other apparel. This dress though, against what their measurement chart suggests, does run very small. My daughter is 5'10½" tall, 33B x 27W x 38H so the small would have been way too small and not long enough. The large fit perfect.

This is a gorgeous, well-made dress for the price. I am giving it a 3 out of 5 because there was enough just off enough for me to not keep it. First and foremost, I didn’t necessarily find the dress very flattering for my slender/athletic body-type (probably mostly because of the shine of the satin-like fabric). I am 5’5”, 117 lbs, 32C, 26 waist and typically wear a Size 2. As you can see in some of the photos, the dress attracts attention to any ripple in the stomach area - even if it’s just the general outline of your bellybutton. I’ve never worn them myself, so I don’t own a pair - but I’m thinking a nice pair of Spanx would help tremendously! Additionally, the dress was SUPER long on me. It would have needed to be hemmed. The draping is beautiful for pictures, but not effective for walking around or dancing. Per some of the previous reviews, the arm holes were just a tad tight - but not too much of a concern for me. At the end of the day, the dress is a quality thick satin-like fabric that is soft to the touch and seems to be wrinkle resistant with a fun flute/mermaid cut - super fun for a gala or themed decades costume party. I loved the fact you can wear a normal bra with it! Great slight cowl cut on top. It is a beautiful color and could be the right dress for the right person! Just not for me.

Also, the design is Top notch and looks high end 👍🏻The satiny material looks and feels luxurious against your skin. 🥰 I chose black because this is a timeless looking dress and with that elastic waist if I gain or lose a few pounds this will still fit me beautifully and look right on so this is definitely a keeper. In my opinion I hardly recommend it.! I don’t think you’ve got a little black dress like this in your closet so this is a need in my opinion not a want😉🙃

Fun dress, a little small for tall people This is a well made unlined dress that is perfect for fall. It is easy to wash (cold water, tumble dry low) and pack, however wrinkles will need to be steamed out. I am 5’11”, 175lbs and ordered a large. Note that the sleeves were a smidgen too short (and elastic on sleeve snug) as well as the waist being just a little too high. I think the dress’ cut would be perfect on someone a couple inches shorter. Very fashionable. Can dress up or down (like I did with flip flops).

Tunic for tall ladies This is adorable and fabric is stretchy and forgiving but will show lumps and bumps so use spanx. It is definitely too short for me at 5’8” it rides up over bum when arm is raised. Would have to wear with leggings and it’s cute but will exchange for black.

Simple but elegant wedding dress! This is amazing! I’ve never wanted to buy an expensive wedding dress that I would only wear for a day. Despite all the objection from the ladies in my life, I turned to Amazon to find a dress. I figured I could always just return it if I hated it. I saw another reviewer wearing this dress with a bridal belt and I loved it! So, I bought this dress, a bridal belt and a lace cardigan all from amazon! I bought a different cardigan at first and hated it but returned it with no hassle! Of course, I haven’t had my wedding yet so I’m just sharing a picture of me trying it on (I will be wearing a shirt heel strap oh sandal with it, also from Amazon). I am 5’3”, 160lbs. This is size L. My friend who is 5’8” and 145lbs also tried this on and it looks great on her too! It really is for any body type(I’m hiding a lot of stomach fat under there). This can be dressed up with a bridal belt or the belt can be left off for a more simple look! I plan to dye this dress pink or black after my wedding so I can wear it again (I’m not one to buy meaningless things, I hardly even buy home decor that doesn’t have a function). Don’t hesitate to buy it! You will look wonderful! You can always buy two sizes at the same time and return the one you don’t want for an expedited process. Also, what you wear underneath makes a difference for my fellow curvy girls! I purchased an expensive bodysuit shapewear (the ones with built in bras) from here and it looked horrible. Every buldge and roll could be seen! So, I just bought a less expensive shapewear tank top which I’m wearing under here and it made all the difference. This is pretty sheer so you will need a nude slip! Even with purchasing all the different bits and pieces to put together my own wedding dress, I only ended up paying around $170 for everything from head to toe that I will wear for my wedding.

Beautiful dress with stunning details This is an extraordinarily beautiful dress! I am 5’2”, about 140 lbs with a 36DD chest and ordered a medium. I’ll need to get this dress hemmed, as it is way too long (even with heels). Works for girls with larger chests. Keep in mind that there is a lot of material. There are a few downsides. The zipper tends to stick, making it difficult to get on. It takes some patience. Also, the off the shoulders look on the top can be a bit square to the hips, adding a few pounds. Nothing that some nice posing can’t fix, but it’s good to know. I originally bought this for my wedding. Not sure if I will use it for my wedding dress or for a rehearsal or reception dress. It would work for any of these. Overall, it has a lovely, vintage feel with gorgeous lace detailing- all for a great price.

Who sewed this! This is my experience with this dress: First, it is a beautiful color! The concept was good, the assembly was not! I'm 5' 3", 149lbs. I work out and have an athletic, older persons build. I ordered a M, it fit weird. The top right side was tight across my breast area, BTW I'm a A+ cup (the + is for effort in amost being a B cup! Lol). The shoulder strap was also snug enough that I knew after awhile it was going to start to irritate my skin. The left side was loose and had a big pouf of material just above the waist line, which looked weird. You could tuck it under the belt, but realistically we all know it's not going to stay there for long. I ordered another medium and large to see if they fit any better. (I forgot to take pictures of those 2, sorry!) The 2nd medium was slightly less thight in the areas I had mentioned and the pouf was still there, just not as big. The large looked the best as far as giving that pleated look the model in the picture had. It fit better in the strap area and across my right breast. Unfortunately, the left side under my arm area was so loose it ballooned out on the side of the dress. The waist was a little big. The material just above the side waist area was also pulled and sewn in 2 different directions, which caused it not to lay smooth in an area that was supposed to be. This one also had that big odd pouf just above the waist. Two more things to note. This dress is thin with no liner, but I don't think it is see thru, at least not the dark blue. It does produce static and attracts lint. In the summer it would be fine, but its Nov. in the midwest and it's becoming dry. Just trying it on, it was attracting things. I had to lint roll it as I folded it up to return.

BUY ITTT! This is my first ever Amazon review despite having bought hundreds, if not thousands of products over the years. This dress is SO GOOD. I don’t own or wear a lot of dresses. I bought and returned several before finding this one. It’s absolutely perfect. Having carried 4 babies, my body isn’t what it used to be, this dress is so flattering and gives you this amazing shape. I feel so good about myself in it! It is the perfect thickness, ribbed, and hugs you in all the right places. The coverage is great, breathability was perfect for an outside wedding in early September in Tn. I am actually about to purchase another color for an upcoming baby shower. It’s that good! For reference, I am 5’8” and 170lbs. I originally bought the L (12-14) but it wasn’t tight enough and a bit too long. So I returned and purchased the M (8-10) and I just can’t say enough good things about it honestly! I wish I had more places to wear it!

Had to review because it’s that great of a dress This is my first time EVER writing a review on Amazon. This dress is that amazing for me to write a review. Literally in love with it. I’m 4’11 and weigh roughly 155lbs. I never thought I could wear something like this in my life. But once I had tried it on, I knew this would be the dress to get proposed in. It’s literally perfect. It hugs my body in a great way. Obviously I have some stomach curves, but the dress doesn’t make it look as terrible as it seems like other dresses. It’s not too tight and it’s not loose. If you’re worried that it’s too long because you’re short, I say give it a try, it might be different when you try it on. The one complaint I do have about the dress is that it doesn’t have a clasp on the dress. I had to get a tailor to sew one on for me because if you have a big chest like mine, the zipper might not stay up as well. But overall, this dress is literally amazing and is my favorite dress that I have ever bought on Amazon.

Very Comfortable! This is my first time giving wide leg pants a try and I’m happy with my purchase. For reference, I’m 5’7, 200lbs with a long torso. I originally bought size XL and it fit everywhere except my waist. My torso is so long and the pants couldn’t sit high enough on my waist line like it’s intended to. The fabric kept bunching in the crotch area and looked really awkward. So I exchanged for one size larger and the extra room was perfect! I would recommend pairing these pants with a fitted top like a bodysuit for the best overall look if you’re a gal with curves.
