Beautiful top, true to size and product description! This is my second top from Bashafo, and they did not disappoint! There is a lot to like about this top: 1) Elegant and modest V-neckline. I love the pleats in the chest! 2) Puff long sleeves and ruffle cuffs give the top a very beautiful, feminine look! 3) The top is long enough for modesty, especially when wearing with leggings and jeggings. The back of the top is a bit longer than the front, which I like! 4) Soft, comfortable, non-clingy fabric, good stitching and finish! 5) The product is true to size. I am 5'4" 115 lb, and the size small fits me perfectly. I usually wear a size small in tops and dresses. The sleeves hit my wrist at the right level. I would highly recommend going by the seller's size chart. 6) The fabric composition is exactly as described by the seller on Amazon - this gets top points from me! Very often, in the product page, tunics and tops are listed with a certain fabric composition, but the actual product label lists a totally different fabric composition. But with this Bashafo brand top, the product label exactly matches the fabric composition on the Amazon product page. Overall, this is a very beautiful top with feminine details and great workmanship. I highly recommend!

WOW! NICE! This long evening gown is so nice! The material feels amazing, stretchy and silky and won't ever wrinkle! I am 115 lbs. 5'6" 34DD 39/29/35 and the medium fits beautifully and comfortably. Very Elegant This long, elegant dress practically begs for a special occasion. Whether that means a wedding or a fancy night out, the subtle mermaid silhouette dress offers a great look that shows off the wearer’s curves. The neckline is modest, but the sheer area makes it kind of fun. The beading detail around the neck is very eye-catching and only needs a pair of earrings to compliment it (no necklace needed!). The sleeves have a bit of a flare to them that mimics the subtle mermaid style of the bottom of the dress. The fabric is soft but doesn’t seem like it would wrinkle, making the dress travel friendly. In fact, it arrived folded up several times but had zero wrinkles when it was pulled out. The person wearing this dress in the attached photo is 5’7” and 211 pounds. She’s wearing heels. The dress touches the floor without heels. She usually wears a size 16 and that’s the size of the dress.

I feel like a princess with pockets! This lovely dress came quickly and it’s amazing! I saw the reviews speaking about the magical and rarely-seen pockets!! YES, there are pockets as previously stated OMG! Please, I’m begging all clothesmakers out there, to hear our call for more pockets! I love nothing more than slipping my wallet and keys into my dress pockets and taking a walk without a purse!! And I can confirm, these are real pockets! They fit more than my hand. I use a cane, a walker, and a wheelchair to get around. Trust me, I would love more clothes with pockets because I already must carry around so much stuff, and then a purse LOL – Ok, I will step down from my soap box 😊 The weight of the fabric really caught my attention. The dress is heavy feeling, but I don’t mind the weight of it as I’m wearing it. I am 5’ and I forgot to measure before I ordered so it comes to the floor on me HAHA!! I am lucky to have a sewing machine so I can fix my shortcomings lol!! I have neuropathy from health issues and my skin is super sensitive. I love how this dress feels on my skin. I even fell asleep on my recliner with the cats, and I wasn’t uncomfortable at all. The dress feels like a hug. I am going to order one more as soon as I can. I’m 5’ 170 and this was a size large. Happy shopping!! (Oh color differences in my pictures were the same dress but in different lights/places. When wearing it outside or in my kitchen it looks like the color in the first picture, other pictures from white light in my bedroom.

Lovely, Versatile Jacket This Luvamia jacket is just as pictured. It is true to size, and has a lovely feminine shape. It's of good quality but feels slightly 'sharper'/stiffer... not as smooth fabric than an identical I've been buying from another seller. I did read many reviews saying it's of excellent quality, so maybe this one, and this particular color, was a one of? I also got it at a discount price so, overall, I'm very happy with it. I love the polks dot lining, especially when I can roll up the sleeves. I'm 67 years old, 5'4", and around 120lbs, ordered size Small and it fits me perfectly.... as my pics show.If you're looking for a nice complimentary jacket to go over pants, jeans, dress, skirt, or even a pair of shorts, this one is perfect. I hope my review is of some help. Thank you.

This material is super comfortable. I’m 5’0”, 150 lbs, usually wear a large. I got this dress in a large, it’s a little loose but I don’t mind it. I think sizing down to a medium could be too snug.

Very long and tight but beautiful on This material is very stretchy and form fitting so you may want some sort of body shaper under it. It is very pretty on and will accentuate your curves. The dress is very long on me and I’m 5’10”, it was dragging the ground. I did have to pin the sleeve area to get it to stay where I wanted. When I moved my arms the sleeves would ride up. Overall I do love the dress. I wore it to a masquerade ball and received lots of compliments on the dress.

One of my new faves This maxi dress is a winner! It is so flattering and the overall look is exactly what I expected. I followed the size chart and ordered a medium, and it fit great. If I had to make a minor complaint… the v-neck was pretty low to just wear to work or church as is. So, if you’re planning to wear this in a more conservative setting, you’ll probably have to safety pin the neckline in place. Otherwise, I absolutely love this dress! It’s a faux wrap style, so I didn’t have to mess around with tying it just right. And the form-fitting top paired with the flowy skirt is so beautiful and accentuates the body very well. Also, this dress has POCKETS! I carried around my keys and my cell phone all day in there with no problems. And I have to mention the belt… I’m usually not a fan of belts because I don’t like having to fuss with them and adjust them to get them just right… but this one is so cute, I had to make an exception LOL. I tied it in the back to smooth out my look, and the black lining just added such a perfect pop! The material is comfortable and has some stretch to it at the top. The length of the dress is also great; it fell right to the top of my feet, so I didn’t have to worry about tripping over it when I walked (I’m 5’6”). Overall, this is a fabulous dress! The color is very bright and vivid and I got compliments all day when I wore it to work. I highly recommend if you’re a fan of maxi dresses and are looking for something that’s very well designed!

Perfect color peacock blue & love the style! I now own FOUR! This peacock blue matched almost perfectly with a dress color that is supposed to be teal (but has no greenish color to it at all). I was extremely excited by the color match to the pretty blue and then doubly thrilled to see the great quality of this shrug! It's made well and hangs nicely with the cutest sleeves! Even the back hangs well and doesn't show back fat from bras. Compared to other shrugs, I don't believe it will hold wrinkles as you can see it looks pretty good directly out of the shipping package in my photos. The 2x also fits great and I am a US women's plus size 24-26, bra size 44D. I immediately ordered one in another color!! I'll add an update on that one when it's received. Well made - heavy material This review is for the “ FANDEE Maxi Dress for Women 3/4 Sleeve Semi-Formal Wrap Dress Floor Length V Neck Long Dresses with Pocket&Belt” - Size Large Pros: Material (I like that it’s heavy which helps with the fit, it’s not see through, lots of stretch), big pockets (I can fit my cell phone as well as two or three additional small items) Cons: There’s a little too much material around the arm pit area causing some drooping but it isn't too obvious. I’m 5’3” 162lb 36G bust 36” waist 46” hips. This fits well. Due to the stretch of the material, a medium probably would have fit good as well.

Sleeveless dress had interesting lace pattern and fell at the the knee This review is for the green sleeveless XL dress. I am 5'4" and pear shaped and have had 2 kids. My husband selected and ordered this dress for me. Amazon recommended a Large, but he went with the XLarge. The dress came down much further on me than on the model and than in some of the other reviewer pictures - but I want a longer dress, so that is a plus actually. I appreciate the wide shoulders. The color is darker than shown in the model photos, but again, I like it. The lace has a variety of patterns to it that I think is interesting and fun, but I am concerned about how easily it could snag on something when I'm wearing it. The XLarge probably is a bit too large on me as it doesn't fit very well in the back, and there is extra room in the chest, but I think a Large wouldn't look too good either. It isn't a bad dress, the lace is really different looking which adds interest, but I don't think the cut is flattering on my body shape. My husband said he likes it, but I think it is going to go back. If I saw this on someone else I would definitely compliment it based on the darker green color and uniqueness of the lace!

Gorgeous color, lightweight This sequin cami dress is so sparkly and the color is a gorgeous emerald green. The sequins are stitched to the mesh material which means they lay smoother and aren’t as scratchy. The fabric itself is a thin stretchy, lightweight mesh with a mesh lining and the dark color is pretty opaque. The straps are adjustable and the slit is modest. The dress is form fitting, but has no structure or compression so I will need to wear my shapers underneath to create a more smooth silhouette. I am 5’ and it is basically a full length gown on me. Overall, the look is really pretty and flattering and the construction is good. The price is in line with the style of dress.

Trendy and Sophisticated This set is really lovely and is versatile for both warm and cool weather. When I initially ordered it, I had reservations about the tie front, but to my surprise, it turned out to be really flattering. The way the top crops just above the wide-leg pants adds sophistication. The fabric feels luxuriously soft and drapes gracefully, creating a silhouette that complements any body type. Despite my usual apprehension towards thinner fabrics, given my narrow figure and petite hips, the waistband gives me a comfortable and well-fitted look. I went to happy hour with girlfriends, and they commented on the 'rich mom' vibes I was giving in this outfit. It's a perfect blend of sophistication and style, and can be worn with heels or flats. I'm 5'2" and the size small fits me well, and the pants' length is just right. If you're much taller, then pants would give a cropped look. The color is true to the photographed image. This set should be a staple in anyone's closet!

Lots of good, a few issues This velvet dress is made from super soft and comfortable velvet. I ordered the navy-blue color, and it's really more of a dark peacock blue in person to me, still very pretty, just not exactly navy. I like that it has a crew neckline, long sleeves and is full length. At this point in my life, I just want a dress that looks nice and is comfortable, but I don't have to wear any crazy foundation garments or specialized bra and tape to wear, so this is perfect. The cut of the dress is a little unusual. I'm 5"8" 125lbs, broad shouldered, straight figure, 34A. The dress definitely has more of an empire waist on it than the website pics appear. I say this as a fairly flat chested person, and it was still a weird height waist on me. The other issue is that the belt is a little off. The belt loops are crazy big, so I'll remove them. The belt is matching fabric and wrap around. I really like the length of the sleeves and total length which is great for taller gals. I ordered the size small, but if I were to order it again, I'd get a medium, so I'd have a little more fabric in the torso before the skirt portion starts. This might be an issue for busty ladies, unless you want a true empire style. There is a lot to love about this dress, but I may not end up using it for my party because of the chest/torso portion, I haven't decided.

Very Comfortable and Flattering This was actually a last minute second bridesmaid dress for me, as my first one did not work out. I was worried that I would be disappointed with a second choice dress but ended up liking it more than my original. It is very stretchy and easy to move/dance in. It doesn’t have a zipper which helps a lot since my bust always causes zipper issues. It was very comfortable and not restricting at all. I also thought it was very flattering and a good mix of flowy and formal. The color is more red than burgundy or berry, but that wasn’t an issue for me. It was also much too long for me (I am 5 ft 2) so I did have to hem it. There was a cut on the fabric near the bottom of the dress, but it was part of the portion I was cutting off so it wasn’t an issue for me. I did size up (ordered size 8, usually size 6) as these kinds of dresses tend to run small. The bust was roomy enough but has a grippy lining near the top seam so it didn’t fall down. I got a lot of compliments and was able to feel comfortable while also feeling pretty, which is a win in my book.

This. Dress. Is. GORGEOUS!! The colors are a beautiful, vibrant water-color effect against a soft summer-white field. Why hasn't anyone else posted their pics of this print?? My pics really don't do it justice! The fabric is actually a substantial jersey-type knit with a very smooth feel. It will be hard to snag. In other words, this fabric is a higher end quality than you're going to find with just any off-the-rack dress. The bodice is lined but the skirt doesn't really need a lining. It came out of the bag quite wrinkled but hopefully it will smooth out over time. See pics. And here's my bit of advice with any dress: wear a slip. Always. Regardless of what color it is. Can't stress this enough. It's not about whether a dress is transparent. It's about flow and drape. If a slip is worn, the dress doesn't end up getting stuck between the knees when you're walking regardless of size. This dress can be worn with a crinoline if you're wanting to go retro but it definitely doesn't need one. It just all depends on the effect you're going for. For size reference, I got the XXL and I'm 5'6 and 180. The dress is actually quite comfortable despite some of the reviews stating otherwise. The fabric has some stretch to it so any reaching that needs to be done can be done fairly comfortably, provided the correct size is worn. Add a pair of off-white dress gloves and matching shoes (also Amazon purchases!) to provide the perfect finishing touch!

If a slip is worn, the dress doesn't end up getting stuck between the knees when you're walking regardless of size. This dress can be worn with a crinoline if you're wanting to go retro but it definitely doesn't need one. It just all depends on the effect you're going for. Add a pair of off-white dress gloves and matching shoes (also Amazon purchases!) to provide the perfect finishing touch!

Worked for me but things to know Ultimately this dress worked well for me at an outdoor Miami wedding, but there were some challenges. Pros: The dark blue and gray blue colors are both gorgeous. (More later on why I have two of these dresses.) Customer service quickly sent me a replacement for the dark blue dress. (Again, more later.) After the initial gentle ironing, the gray blue dress traveled well in my carry-on. The fabric hung beautifully (I’m nearly 5’8”, 116 lbs.); it’s like satiny slip or nightgown fabric. I dressed it up with a silver wrap and shoes, received many compliments, and still looked good after hours of dancing (two photos provided here were taken late night after the wedding, forgot to pose with the full ensemble). The price is hard to beat. Cons: I gently washed the dark blue dress before wearing and it came out covered with tiny spots (see one photo); I feel certain it was not due to my washer (the instructions did not seem to requite hand washing) but I can’t say for sure whether it was due to faulty dye or something else out of my control. The stitching at the neck, arms and side slits, while not super prominent, looks a bit cheap and is more obvious on the gray blue dress than the dark one (see photo of neck area). The two rounded buttons at the back of the neck are VERY difficult to get in and out of the loops provided. (I succeeded but recommend you replace them with slightly smaller buttons or have someone ready to help.) The small was not at all fitted as in the ad photos. I am happy with the fabric, but be aware it is thin and won’t hide much except for some help provided by the flowing nature of the dress. The full story is that, once the laundry debacle occurred with the dark blue dress I ordered through Vine, I ordered and paid full price for the gray blue one right away, fearing the replacement process would take too long and that I couldn’t trust the dark blue fabric. However, customer service assured me the replacement would come quickly and it did, in time for the wedding! That said, I loved the gray blue color and decided to go with that one, not washing it ahead of time. Everything worked out well. I’ll post more photos if I get some shared from the event. I have not yet washed the replacement dark blue dress, as yet unworn, or the gray blue one that’s been worn the one time. I plan to hand wash them with a delicate wash I’ve ordered. I will update with the results!

Decent Quality and Lovely UPDATE: For anyone considering the Champagne color, it is actually more of a pale, warm (faintly pink) nude color (attached more pictures). I have pale olive skin that leans slightly cool-neutral in tone (though I have a fading, fake tan in all the photos), that would work with the gentle tone of the dress. Just keep in mind that it doesn’t quite resemble the product photos. _______________ Infinity dresses are so versatile, so if you’re looking to get one for a lower cost, this is a fantastic option (though, still a little pricey for actual cost and ease to make it yourself). There is an elastic seam in the waist, but the rest of the edges are unfinished and not hemmed. HOWEVER, a bonus is that the elastic waist is relatively hidden with an internal seam — so none of the visible bunching of fabric at elastic waists in similar, cheaper-looking infinity dresses. The fabric is your typical “stretch knit” (polyester-spandex) blend, so there is a slight sheen, so darker colors will look more formal for that reason. Overall, it makes a great option for those wanting something customizable for costumes or events favoring matching sets (that is, perfect for bridesmaids of difference sizes). I’m about 5’1” tall with a 34B bust, 26-27” waist, and a 37” hip. I think it should be just at floor level (maybe a bit longer) if I wear 3” heels, so perfect if you’re petite and don’t have time to have the dress altered.

Decent Quality and Lovely UPDATE: For anyone considering the Champagne color, it is actually more of a pale, warm (faintly pink) nude color (attached more pictures). I have pale olive skin that leans slightly cool-neutral in tone (though I have a fading, fake tan in all the photos), that would work with the gentle tone of the dress. Just keep in mind that it doesn’t quite resemble the product photos. _______________ Infinity dresses are so versatile, so if you’re looking to get one for a lower cost, this is a fantastic option (though, still a little pricey for actual cost and ease to make it yourself). There is an elastic seam in the waist, but the rest of the edges are unfinished and not hemmed. HOWEVER, a bonus is that the elastic waist is relatively hidden with an internal seam — so none of the visible bunching of fabric at elastic waists in similar, cheaper-looking infinity dresses. The fabric is your typical “stretch knit” (polyester-spandex) blend, so there is a slight sheen, so darker colors will look more formal for that reason. Overall, it makes a great option for those wanting something customizable for costumes or events favoring matching sets (that is, perfect for bridesmaids of difference sizes). I’m about 5’1” tall with a 34B bust, 26-27” waist, and a 37” hip. I think it should be just at floor level (maybe a bit longer) if I wear 3” heels, so perfect if you’re petite and don’t have time to have the dress altered.

Surprisingly Nice Dress for Any Age or Size. Usually with the other GK items I’ve tried, I consider them a more mature or matronly fit. But, ironically, this fun “mother of the bride” semi-formal dress and jacket is stylish for any age. Honestly, I got it mainly for the colorful sequin jacket, but I’m very impressed with the entire ensemble. I’m 5’7”, 115lbs, 34C, 27”Waist, 34”Hips, and got a size 6. It fits great, maybe a bit loose and drooping in the waistband, but I’m on the skinny side. The skirt is ultra flowy with a modest slit. I’m also happy with the jacket. It will fit a range of sizes, but isn’t boxy or too big. The dress is made of a semi-transparent chiffon-like fabric stitched over a solid silky lining. It’s lightweight and comfortable without any irritation from the sequins. They’re attached well, though there are a few loose threads here and there and they occasionally get stuck together. Normally I would not wear black to a wedding, but I think the rainbow of sequins make it just lovely. There are so many different colors that you can wear the jacket with other outfits too. This dress just went into my fancy-stuff rotation. It’s so versatile for a variety of events.

Cute, comfy, versatile. Wanted to leave a review for this color, since I didn’t see many. The dress is really cute and has good weight and structure to it. This dress will give what you put into it, meaning if you can style it well, it can be a great piece. I’m imagining a cable scarf and rustic knee high boots for fall, or a strapping sandal pump for spring time! It’s a little short in the back if you tie the tie too tight. I am 5’5 and 120 lbs, athletic build. I’m bottom heavy. I imagine this dress would really flatter a larger body style. It doesn’t necessarily accentuate my figure as a smaller woman, i feel a bit swallowed by it, but it’s cute nonetheless. Don’t always need a sleek fit to be sexy! If you’re on the fence, I’d go for it.

high quality dress Warning you may need someone to help you button and zip this dress. The buttons were so difficult to do myself I needed to get my husbands assistance - luckily there are only two for the collar. Would recommend one of those button hook tools if you will not have anyone to assist you. Zipping the dress up required another person as well - there isn't an eye hook above the zipper so trying to get it zipped up on my own was a struggle. I didn't ave high hopes of the dress but once I put it on I was blown away. Material is heavy weight and very soft. There is a lining on the inside of the dress and super comfortable to wear. This dress feels expensive and very well made. It's extremely flattering and looked so good on. I was worried the sizing would be off on me. I usually am a size 6 in dresses and ordered a 4/6 and it fit like a glove - nearly perfect! I am 5'2" and on my tip toes this dress hovers floor length, so perfect length for me in 3-4 inch heels no alterations or hemming needed. Feels like this dress was made especially for me - love it.

Surprisingly good quality for the price Wary of poorly produced prints, I gave this one a try and it didn't disappoint. The pattern is bright and overall the dress is well made. There's a small side zipper, a corset-like laces on the back and the neck band so it was easy to adjust for me. I am 5'7 and 165 lbs, with smaller chest, so having all the adjustments to avoid chest gaps was nice. The belt band is not attached to the dress so it can be worn without it. The material feels nice and light and makes it a perfect summer dress. So far I didn't notice any issues with stitching. The only complaint I have that might be related to shipping / pre-shipping treatment is that when the dress arrived, the package was humid inside, with a bit of condensate. Based on the delivery times, it was in transit for about 24 hours, and the fabric is okay, but I am just not sure why this happened. So make sure to remove the item from the package promptly and not let it sit there for too long.

I normally have a really boring style and I liked that this was a little more fun, more flirty, and more interesting. The navy is a nice color. It arrived a bit wrinkled as expected but did fine after a quick tumble in the dryer. I’m 5’4” and this was a fine length with low heels. I normally wear a size 18 and got an XXL - perfect fit. I think other reviews mentioned that the lining along the neckline tended to bunch and come up. If I could take off half a star for that, I would, because I found myself fixing it a lot throughout the night, but it wasn’t a deal breaker and you could probably fix it with some fabric tape.

The bodice is lace over satin and is very forgiving. With lace can sleeves that cover your shoulder and yet not constricting at all.The high-low skirting is light and airy and moved around me like a mist of fog. I wore a light slip, as it was 90 degrees and needed to make sure it draped nicely.I received so many compliments on this dress. The sizing is true - it runs small. I am 5’2” and a size 8 in this photo. I ordered a large in blue.

One is my favorite dresses! What a pleasant surprise!! I bought this strictly off of the reviews....it did not disappoint. The dress was well made, comfortable and flattering, which is hard to find in ONE dress. The price point was definitely a bonus. The fit was awesome; I'm 5'5" and 145lbs and bought the large, which was perfect!

Fits beautifully What a really nice dress. I love the fabric and the stretchiness of the fabric. I bought a large and I am my 5 foot nine 170 pound female. If you were looking for an elegant yet simple dress this one would be the perfect one.

Can I Give This More Than 5 Stars ****** Order ! What a seriously Gorg Midi Dress ! There is nothing to not love. I ordered the black in Large ( *For Reference 36C / 5'3" ) and it exceeded my expectations. The dress just makes your figure look better. Love it What a stunning maxi dress! I have no complaints, everything about it is a winner. I followed the size chart and the dress fit perfectly. It was form fitting at the top but not too tight that it was uncomfortable. The skirt is so pretty! I love the floral design, and the ruffles are such a beautiful touch! They are very lightweight and flowy. And the stitching of the top to the skirt is also top-notch because it was very smooth and didn’t cut into my skin or anything. The dress fell just above my ankles (I’m 5’6”) so I could easily wear heels or flats. And the material was pretty soft and comfortable for long-time wear. It was lightweight and breathable, so I didn’t have to worry about sweating or discomfort throughout the day. This is quite a quality dress to me, and the style looks very high-end. I could easily see this dress being sold for way more money in a department store or magazine. It looks fabulous and you will look fabulous in it!

Stunning, flattering and beautiful dress What a stunning, beautiful dress! I am 65 and blonde, the dusty rose color is so flattering and the mercury beading matches perfectly. I got SO many compliments. The dress is slimming because the chiffon does not hug the body, and even though it was maybe 4 inches too long (I am 5' 3" and wore 4" heels) it actually looked more elegant than showing the shoe. I love this dress - you can't go wrong. I had an Adrianna Papell dress also, 3 times the price of this - but this was everyone's favorite. I probably could have gotten into the size 6, but I liked the drape of a slightly more comfort fit. The photo here doesn't do it justice...and I don't agree with the review that says the mercury beading doesn't go with the dusty rose, it enhances it beautifully. The photo advertised here on the model shows the dusty rose chiffon as lighter and less sultry than it is under natural lighting.

Great Find! What a surprise! This dress is lovely! I wore it to my husband's company holiday party in received many compliments. The only thing I think it is missing is something else around the waist. I decided not to add anything however. It is full length and is sort of an a-line design. It kind of flares a little bit and is not too tight. it is also very flowy while walking and is fun to wear. I like that it is long sleeves as we live in the Michigan winters and it kept me warm the walk in to the building. It is a gorgeous dress and I would recommend. I am about 5 ft 5 size 32B bra and ordered a small. Highly recommend.

Wow! Amazing dress! What an amazing dress! I've put on a significant amount of weight and was worried about dressing up for a recent event. For reference I'm 5'2 and weigh 220 lbs. The stretch and wrap around feature along with the gorgeous, rich green color made me feel very confident. I received many compliments that night. The price point was the cherry on top! 10/10 recommend!

Wonderfully flattering dress that can be worn for multiple events! What can I say? This dress is amazing! I was looking for a dress to wear to my work Christmas party and stumbled upon this one. I read the reviews, looked at the photographs of others wearing the dress and was sold. I got so many compliments last night and I love the retro vibe of the dress. I'm seriously going to look at other styles from Miusol. The fabric is stretchy and feels like like quality material. I'm 5'4" and on the curvy side (size 16). I almost purchased 2 - 1 in XL and 1 in XXL, but decided to go for the larger one based on the reviews. I'm glad I did because it fit perfectly. It was not too tight and still has a bit of room. I purchased a crinoline skirt/slip to wear underneath for the party. This dress can be dressed up or down depending on the event or occasion. My only complaint is that the neck line is cut a little too deep for my personal taste. I ended up safety pinning the neckline to be a bit more modest since I attended a work event. As others have mentioned, it does arrive wrinkled from the packaging. I put in in my dryer on steam/wrinkle remover and didn't even have to take an iron to the dress before wearing. Also - thank you for saving me a trip to the store and the aggravation of trying on multiple dresses after working all day!

Beautiful knee length dress What can I say? This dress was my favorite part of our engagement photos!!! It was comfortable and flattering. Loved the color. May need it in other colors. I’m 5’6 and 145 lbs and got a medium.

Great shirt for wearing with biker shorts or leggings! What I liked about this shirt is the quality, nice fabric, not too heavy material and so comfortable. I also like that it covers my “bits.” I don’t like my bottom or lady parts outlined in the shorts to be noticeable. The shirt completely covered it up and for me that is my preference. I love the hemline it is curved and it is more flattering. I only wish I’d bought more colors for our trip to Disney because I had to wash it at our resort so I could wear it another day. After I realized biker shorts or leggings are the most comfortable thing to wear in the parks with all the walking. (11 plus miles a day) I’m 5’4 and 170 pounds and as you can see in the picture, it fit perfectly for my shape.

Well made, comfortable, inexpensive What more could you ask for? It can be dressed up for an evening function or down to wear into the office. I'm not a fan of polyester (a lot of it looks cheap) this is a nice relatively heavy polyester that is smooth against your skin but kind of rough on the outside. I'm 5'5', 125 lbs, Depending on the cut of the bodice, I wear either an 8 or a 10 in a dress. I used the size chart and ordered a L. Given the overall loose fit, I think the dress is closer to a size 10 than a size 8. The shoulder seams hang a little off the shoulder and the bust is a bit large. I have no hips so the dress hangs straight down. It's much longer than shown in the ad (see photo) I'll either wear it belted with boots or I'll cut it off (but then I would have to lose the flared hem) and hem it to just below the knee. It's a nice dress, but I think a medium would have fit me better.Update: I decided to go with belt and boots instead of hemming and losing the tulip hem. I like it!

Looks good, well-made, comfortable, inexpensive What more could you ask for? This would be a perfect dress for the office (does anyone still go to the office?) and easily dressed up for an after-work function. I'm not a fan of polyester (a lot of it looks cheap but this doesn't), but the red is such a beautiful deep dark rich red, and the fit is perfect, so I'll make an exception. I'm 5'5', 125 lbs, depending on the cut of the bodice, I wear either an 8 or a 10 in a dress. I used the size chart and ordered a L. I think the dress is closer to a size 8 than a 10. The fit across the shoulders and bust is perfect. I have no hips so the dress hangs in soft folds. the only negative thing that I have to say is that small v neckline would benefit from a slightly heavier interfacing to keep it flat against the chest, but that's not a deal breaker for me.

I want it in every color! When I bought this dress, I was skeptical. I was looking for something to wear to a Summer wedding. I am 5’0” and close to 200lbs. Length is usually an issue for me and I also have 38DD’s. This dress exceeded my expectations! The fit is perfect. The length hit me just right to where it covered what needed to be covered, but it didn’t make me look stumpy. It fits in all the right places. The puff sleeve detail really is cute and comfortable. The tie around the waist feels secure. The print is so adorable and the color is dreamy. This is my favorite dress! I want it in every color. I wore it to the wedding and everyone kept asking where I got it from. It does come a bit wrinkled, but a quick steam fresh out of the package and it was ready to go. Overall, I give it a 15/10!

Love this dress!! When I first got the dress I was disappointed due to the material.. it is a felt. But when I put it on it fit perfectly (3x) it wasn't heavy and it was soooo pretty!. I did have to have it hemmed it was too long I'm 5'5. I'm very satisfied with it and I wish I could wear it somewhere else again it's just too cute to have hanging in the closet.

Cheaply made and not flattering! When I first got this dress, my husband thought it was pajamas in the package, based on the floral pattern. I thought it looked pretty in the pictures, and was hopeful it would look good when I tried it on. I was very disappointed. I’m around 5’4” tall, and the dress came down a lot lower than it did on the model. Almost to my ankles. It looked frumpy and, as my husband said, I looked like a peasant. The picture shows that it was cheaply made, as the tiers aren’t even entirely the same fabric: they used a white fabric in the parts that were hidden under the tier above it. However, those white areas tended to show when I sat down. The seams were also very tiny, around 1/8”, which seemed dangerously close to the edges. Perhaps this is better suited for someone who is taller, like the model in the listing.

It's a head turner! When I first pulled the dress out of the bag I thought, "No way this will fit me." Ummm, incorrect. It snatches you in, it's comfy and doesn't feel too tight, and supports you in all the right places. Loved the blue! I'm 5'6", 185 lbs, and typically wear a size 10 for reference. I purchased a L with plenty of room left to stretch.

Stylish but Slightly Flared at The Hips When I first received the jumpsuit, it felt heavy in the bag. I initially thought the fabric would be thick, but it turns out the weight is probably due to the amount of fabric needed for the full length from top to bottom. The fabric has a ribbed texture, is thin, and very stretchy. If it weren't for the dark color, it would actually be see-through. I held the fabric up to the light and noticed just how thin it really is. There's a zipper in the back that runs from the top down to about the high waist, making it very easy to get into the jumpsuit and zip it back up on my own. The jumpsuit features wide-leg bottoms and two side pockets. The top is snug and fitted to my body, while the bottom is loose with room to spare. The overall look is fine, but the sides of the pants, where the pockets are, flare out and make my hips look wider than usual. The length is perfect for me; it almost touches the ground at the back, which allows me to wear flats or low heels. For reference, I am 5’7” and 128 lbs. I ordered a size M, worrying it might be too small, so I’m not sure if the wide-hip look is because the jumpsuit might be slightly too big for me. Overall, I like the jumpsuit. I just hope the pocket area will relax after washing so my hips don’t look flared out.

A post-wearing review When I first received this dress I had my doubts about the material. I tried it on and thought it looked pretty good so I did not return it right away. I had a wedding to attend and needed to choose between this dress and a slim-fitting RL dress which required special underthings (Spanx). I chose to wear this dress because it has some spandex and no Spanx required. It was a fun dress!! Fit great and felt great! No wrinkles! I saw some reviewers worried about sweating in it. I did not, though my event was in March. Probably wouldn’t wear it in the summer. Lots of restrictions on care - basically hand wash and air dry. I am 5’1” and about 138 lbs. Size 10P fit great.

Lovely dress When I first received this dress, my first reaction was not good! It didn’t fit right! A lot of dresses I get online don’t fit like I’d expected mostly because I’m 5’2” and weigh about 155-160, and my waist is not like it used to be! But I liked the style and the colors/pattern and the fabric! So I tried adding a belt…better! It gave me definition for my waist. It made my legs look fat! That’s because it was too full and the opening to high;so I pinned it underneath so that only my knees down would show…much better! The top part was a little big and I still looked chunky. I added shoulder pads and it balanced me out; made me look slimmer! I’m really happy with it now! Dress was less than $50 and I didn’t have to have it tailored. Love it!

Really loved this dress! When I first tried this dress on I was worried it was kind of an awkward length but ended up loving it and getting so many compliments. I’m 5’3” and usually a size 18 or 20 in dresses. I bought a 3X (size 18) and it fit perfectly.

Very flattering and beautiful dress! When I looked in the mirror, I felt really good! This dress is comfortable yet flattering and will suit many body types. It was super forgiving of my mom bod, and the waist has fabric that you can adjust depending on where your natural waist sits, so it really can be fine tuned. The fabric does wrinkle though, so if you travel with it, you'll have to steam it. Other than that, it's amazing. I'm 5'5", and your typical size 14/16 49yo mom.

Love it - except it's defective When I opened this dress I was incredibly pleased - it's a perfect ankle length (I'm 5'2" and ordered a medium), good heft, and doesn't show too much of my bust. But unfortunately there's a line across the one side of the chest that makes it look like my bra line is permanently showing (when that isn't the shape or placement of the bra I was wearing). My guess is that some machine was too hot and damaged the fabric. Whatever the cause, I'm really disappointed; you would expect better from such an expensive dress.

Hides the mommy pooch! When I put this on it was somewhat tight as I pulled it up over my hips, but once it was zipped up it looked great! My husband loved it! The only big reactions he gives are when it’s sports related, but he smiled and said “wow!” This is a win! The neckline is modest and it gives the appearance of a plunging neckline because the type of appliqué. Also, I’ve got a mommy pooch and it totally hides it! This is a perfect going out to eat jumper! I got a small and it’s true to size. Im 5’5” 120 lbs.

I love the color and love all the compliments I got while wearing. Get this! (For reference, 5'5" 130 lbs; usually wear XS/S women's; I got a size XS)

Great dress for the price When I saw the dress I didn't think I would like it, but once I tried it on it fit great. I ordered the XLarge. I am 5"2, 200 lbs., chest 38, waist 32 and hips 46. The material does have some movement to it. The only con for me was the neck was a little to big.

Nice for the price When I saw the polyester crepe looking material in the plastic bag upon arrival I was totally disappointed. HOWEVER, it surprisingly looks better on than expected. Yass! Buy it! When I say I loved this dress I loved it! It was way too long as I am only 5'3 but it worked. Even with a 4 inch heel it still dragged! It fits every curve you have! The fabric is thick almost like fleece so it was perfect for the cold weather we had NYE. Get this dress! You will not be disappointed! I brought an Xl because I am bottom heavy so had to make sure that zipper went over the essentials🥰

Shocked at the excellent quality When I stepped out on the red carpet I felt like a princess. This dress makes a statement and demands attention. My only complaint is if you’re short like me (5’3”) the slit will need to be sewn up some, unless you’re ok with your lady bits showing. I did have my seamstress add straps but it holds up fine without them and I’m large in the breast area, it was just my personal preference to have straps. Other than that this dress was absolutely stunning.

This dress was well worth the price When I tell you this dress was well made, and heavy in material that's what I mean. My family pictures were perfect because of my dress. I am 5'9 259 lbs I absolutely love it and would definitely order from this seller again. I took the pads out that covered the breast and added a lace one piece bodysuit underneath.

Most versatile fit for any shape! When ordering clothes online, I always try to find a girl with my similar shape (small waist/bigger hips). I saw that this dress looked like it could be very versatile using the wrap around waist. For reference I am 5’8 and 148Ibs, I ordered a Medium. The dress arrived on time and was on great condition upon receiving. The dress for great! The wrap around the waist really helps with adjusting how you would like the dress to fit. I’m 5’8 and it was a bit short in the back, but I wasn’t doing too much (moving around) in the dress but having to take pictures. I received many compliments in my dress. It was exactly what I was looking for! You can pair this dress with so many different types of shoes based on the look you are going for. You won’t regret the purchase!

Very Comfortable When the dress arrived I was pleasantly surprised. It felt comfortable & elegant (for a black tie optional wedding/guest). It's a very simple dress and the slit helped it feel more flattering & dressy. The material is nice (not too thin) but I sure needed to wear a one piece undergarment to keep things smooth. The one bigger criticism I have is I do not care for the long belt it comes with. I used my own belt that has a little bling in the front. I think it dressed it up more. (I added a photo to try to get a close up of the belt I used). I was comfortable the whole evening, never any pulling or riding up or anything. Plenty of dancing, walking, sitting, standing- and never worried about the dress at all, I was totally comfortable. I got a size Large- I am 5'2 & 158 pounds.

Amazing Fit Great Dress When the dress came and i took it out of the package, it honestly looked cheap and did not seem like it would look good on but boy was i fooled. This dress fit like a glove! Decent for the price When the dress first came it had a very odd smell. I was able to get it cleaned and the smell was gone. I followed reviews and ordered a size down due to the top fitting larger and it fit well. I’m 5’4 135 lbs and I ordered the size 2. The fabric that goes behind the corset back didn’t fully reach so I just tucked it in and wore the back open with just the tie. Also I had to stitch the slit together because it actually went up as high as my belly button. I got lots of compliments and in the end I did like the dress. Also, I think it is good to know that there is also a zipper on the back which was hard for me to zip since I sized down. It did zip but it was pretty tight for me. I wore it with heels and the length was good.

The quality is top notch! Where do I begin to describe this sophisticated dress……, the style is so classy, the quality is top notch , the fit is perfect, and the price is unbelievable! I’m in my friend’s wedding and was asked to wear light blue for her bridal shower. I searched in high end stores, boutiques and other online shopping platforms but couldn’t find a light blue dress that’s fits my aesthetic……until I scrolled to this timeless classy dress. I’m so pleased that I purchased it! ADDED NOTE: I found the feedback from other customers about sizing to be very . I’m 5’6” and weigh 175 lbs and I ordered a size large. I wear medium but the large fits comfortably and lays SO lovely in all the right places. I rate this dress a 100.

WINNING DRESS!! Where do I start? I was stopped on the street in Washington DC, by 4 different people to compliment this dress. One compliment, "You look like royalty ". I typically wear a size 8/10 and size M fit perfectly. The length is long, and it needed hemming, so give yourself time to have hemmed if buying for an event. I WANTED to love it… Where to start. If you look at the photos, you will see that the top is 100% see-through. I didn’t see that in the promo photos. So just Be aware you will need to wear a black camisole or bra or something like that underneath unless you wanna show your boobies. I guess you could put a bright color underneath there to schnaz it up a little bit. Anyway… I am 5’10” and I weigh 210 pounds. So I’m a big person and I have extremely long legs. I have a 32 inseam for reference. So, it wasn’t a surprise that these were too short however, the distance between the crotch and the shoulders was also too short. Again, I’m very tall, so this is something that I actually see a lot with clothing. I ordered an XXL and it was too small. It’s made of the fabric that is basically a tell all x-ray machine anyway. That coupled with the fact that it was about two sizes too small, made for a very bad fit. I guess to say it was a bad is kind of an understatement. I think maybe a very young body, maybe a fit body, the lines would look better. I can recommend this for shorter people who don’t mind the material clings and shows everything on your body. I did want to love it and maybe I could’ve with a combination of it being a little bigger, and or my body being a little bit more fit in toned, but it was also too short kind of everywhere. All in all I don’t think it’s a bad buy but probably about $20-$30 too much. It’s kind of cheap. Hope this helps!

Classy While it was wrinkled coming out of the bag, it is a fantastic material. The fabric is not too thin or see through and it looks great once ironed. There is a side zipper that makes it easy to put it on and take off. The back is an elasticized material that accommodates for a larger bust. Overall a nice dress for going out or as a wedding guest. So gorgeous. Fits a bit loose though While this dress is just strikingly beautiful (do I even need to point that out?), it has its weirdness. For example, the thin foam pads in the bust (non-removable unless one cuts a hole) are kinda awkward and large, upside down triangles. But, they seem to work, just watch they don’t get crooked. I’m 5’7”, 115lbs, 34A, 27”Waist, 34”Hips. I know I’m thin as a rail, but the Small is just loose enough to not be form-fitting like it should be. Especially loose in the waist and hips. If they has an XS, that’d probably be better. I normally don’t like tight dresses, but the fabric stretches well and I think this dress looks good a bit tight. If you’re between sizes or not sure, I’d suggest sizing down. I love the length and mermaid flare and that the lining is sewn directly onto the hem so it doesn’t get in the way. Unfortunately, the one I got has a blank strip right where the dart is so it’s super noticeable. Not all of them will be like that though, of course, but a few may have similar areas. Overall, an obviously splendid dress. I haven’t shopped for a dress this formal in a looong time, so am not up on prices, but this seems like a fair value. As long as you get your sizing right (or know a good seamstress), you’ll be golden.

Great dress, cheap zipper While this dress looks amazing on, the zipper is very cheaply made. Overall, this is a fantastic dress!

Petite gals must buy this!!! Wow! The most flattering dress I've ever worn. I purchased this for my son's Airforce JROTC military ball that I was a chaperone for, so I needed a more formal gown. I don't usually like a fitted style, but this was just right. EVERYONE!!! was complementing me all night. I felt so comfortable in it, very confident. I am 5 ft and lost a few pounds, so about 110 now, 36C and size small was perfect. I did have to hem it as the length was a few inches long. That is all too common with my height, so I expected that. However, if you can use an iron, you can easily fix that with HeatnBond UltraHold Iron-On Adhesive also purchased here on Amazon. Since there are no layers to this dress, and the fabric is so easy to work with, it is easy to iron on the HeatnBond. It is ideal for this dress. Easily done and you don't need a sewing machine. I just might make it knee length for another event later and this dress would easily accommodate that with the slit.The vertical swag of fabric really adds a nice feminine flare. And the gathering fabric at the stomach is such a nice camouflage to hide the mama belly. The fabric is not too thin, just right to hide the panty line, there is no slip layer. I do advise that you iron or steam it so this fantastic dress looks it's best. I also purchased this dress in red, my son's school color. The fabric and fit was exactly the same, but we both decided we prefer the color blue for this event. My nude heals went so well with the color. Excellent quality for the price. I also ordered my clutch from Amazon, it is the Milisente Flower Evening Bag. Love that too!

soft and stunning Wow! This dress exceeded my expectations. Yes, it's not real lace, yes it's sort of like a For Love and Lemons FP dupe, but it's breathtaking! I love the simple little bolero, though bear in mind, it won't stand up to a cycled wash. The nude slip beneath the dress was comfortable and flattering, the V shaped back is exquisite and the little lace patterns, delicate. The best part? The dress is stretchy and curve hugging without being unflattering. I'm a pretty round medium and the dress that arrived was small. Nonetheless I was able to zip my self in comfortably and walk around easily. The gown is long but even as a petite woman of 4' 11" a pair of heels would allow me to walk around in this dress without the need to hem it. My only complaint concerns the straps, which are a bit...cheap looking and fragile seeming. Otherwise this FP dupe is perfect for most formal occasions and in a pinch, a courthouse wedding. The price is excellent for the design and quality. I just ordered myself one in black (sized Medium) and it fits as well, though slightly longer. LOVE LOVE LOVE!

I am 5'2", weigh 120 lbs and ordered size Small. Sizing is pretty much accurate, however the model is clearly wearing a very large size in order to achieve that floating, loose fit. I purchased this in white, in size medium. I really love it! So I purchased another in black in small. This garment is boxy style so both sizes worked for me. The material is 95% polyester and 5% Spandex. Great blend for a pool/ beach cover-up and will hold up to multiple washings. The material is light and silky with a slight fabric weave and 2 pockets. It's basically a boxy, drop shoulder mini dress. I'm 5' and it's pretty short. So if you want to flatter your middle with a stylish loose garment, but show off your legs, this is the right garment for you. It can also be worn as a long T-shirt over yoga pants or shorts.

This is a great cover-up with a balance of class and sexiness. I'm 5'4", 135 lb, and curvy, and the medium fits fine. The cover up and tie are made of a chiffon material. The first item I received had a defective tie where the stitching came undone (second picture), but the exchange was simple and the second item I received was fine. I appreciate the sleeves and long length (about knee length on me). The top part is pretty open and there's not really a good way to keep it closed if you want a more modest cover-up. I like it as is, and the open top actually looks really nice with a swimsuit that covers the chest. This cover up is great for protecting your shoulders while laying out in the sun, yet the panels can be moved to the side if you still want sun on your chest/abdomen/legs. One thing to note is that if you have it tied with both sides in the middle (like in my picture), it will probably open up a bit as you walk around. Again, not a problem for me but not ideal if you want a more modest look. One thing that would be nice is if it had a small hole in one of the sides so you could feed one of the ties through to turn it into a wrap, because there is enough fabric for that. Overall I'm very pleased with my purchase!

These are fantastic. The pads that come in most swimsuits are garbage, so I bought these to replace them all and I’m so glad I did. They give me a nice natural shape with a tiny bit of lift. I appreciate how they’re not overpadded either because I don’t want to feel like I’m wearing a push-up bra in my swimsuit. For reference, I bought the C/D size and wear a 32C bra. These were a great fit for me, but if you’re a full D cup, I’d recommend sizing up to the D/E size. They hold up well in the pool and through multiple washes, plus I’ve been using them in my sports bras too. One thing to note- if you’re looking for something that won’t let any water in, these aren’t it. The outside of these inserts are a breathable nylon with foam inside and water gets in them when you’re submerged in the pool. If you want something truly waterproof, I’d look for silicone inserts instead. But these are extremely comfortable to wear and they dry a little quicker than some other non-waterproof inserts I’ve tried. When I ordered these, they were $20 for 4 pairs which I think is a good value for the price. I’d definitely buy them again.

Cheers to these bra cups! Made of soft synthetic fabric and a foam core, this set of four pairs (8 cups) of bra cups is a dream, especially if you are larger-busted like me (32ddd). I ordered these in size D/E and you can really see that they’re sized up from many of the other foam bra cups out there. I do love the ease and comfort of bra cup inserts (especially because I have neck and back pain), but the proportions are usually off—i.e. the bra cup just sits on my bustline like a hat that’s too small. LOL. Having inserts like these that are sized to cup sized is genius. A reason I think it’s an especially nice product for bigger girls is because the foam “bump” at the bottom of the cup does provide a bit more support and an overall more shapely silhouette. I love the look with my bathing suit, and also have had success in starting these in camisoles that have shelf bras… It really is an upgrade for my look!

I want to show how this bright, colorful, and well-cut Grace Karin bathing suit looks on a real, overweight, middle-aged woman. I'm 5'5" and 175 lbs. I have always been 8 shaped until the last year or so, in which I've gained substantial weight in the midsection. I normally wear a 12-14 in women's tops, and a 14-16/L or XL in women's bottoms. The bathing suit you see in the photos is a size 18. I upsized because I do not like the elastic legs to cut into my thighs; nor do I like the back to ride up. I don't like binding straps. In other words, I like to be comfortable. Upsizing, for me, was the right move. Regarding the suit: the fabric is thick, soft, and high quality, with a substantial lining. There is not a huge amount of stretch - think expensive yoga pant, not the cheapo version. That all translates into a bit of figure-hugging. Stitching is tight and fine (I am an expert at sewing) and I don't expect this suit to fall apart after a couple of uses. This is not that kind of suit; this is more a Maxine of Hollywood quality. The design is very flattering, especially on my lumpy body. The colors are gorgeous. It's the kind of suit you take on a vacation, to make you feel good. As a Vine Voice who received this bathing suit as part of a promotion (this review), it is important that I list any negatives. In this situation, there aren't any, other than my earlier note to consider upsizing for a better fit, if you, like me, don't want the Spanx feel.

I ordered a size L, I’m 5’9 and 160 lbs, and 4 months postpartum. I’ve definitely still got the baby weight in places that I’m insecure about, and I wanted a more full coverage swimsuit than a bikini. An upcoming visit to an indoor water park prompted me to start looking for a one piece suit, and I landed on this one. It’s cute and does the trick of making me feel comfortable and confident while hiding the bits I don’t want everyone else to see. I wish it was a little more supportive of my chest, but that’s a minor issue and probably has more to do with birthing 4 kids. I also am fine with the back butt coverage, I hate with a passion swimsuits that ride up and simultaneously give you a massive wedgie while exposing your entire backside, but this one was totally fine for me. That is to say it is slightly cheeky, so be aware that this will not be your mom’s idea of a full coverage one piece swimsuit.

Love, love, love this suit! As I've gotten older I've started to appreciate a sexy one piece as much as bikinis, and I've been wanting something a little bit retro, a little bit Baywatch, without being too much of either or being super boring. Kind of a tall order for a simple one piece bathing suit - but this one fits the bill exactly. It's easy to slide on, the material feels great, it isn't burdened by cups or anything but doesn't feel like anything is missing. I love the cut in the front and it is definitely flattering for my 34C bust (natural) (but beware, if you need a lot of support for heavy tops, this probably is not for you). Usually I try to hide my broader shoulders/back and the back rolls, but this suit looks super sexy on the back and the butt. It is definitely cheeky though! Do not expect full bottom coverage by any means - my butt is small, and still showing a lot of cheek. Overall this is my favorite one piece I've ever had, and although I've snagged a few cute suits this year, this one will probably be my go-to over any other. Dixperfect design and quality is definitely there with this one!

I’m 5’9” 160lbs with a 3-kid kangaroo pouch and this bathing suit trimmed me right up! We have looked at sarong wraps for some time and finally decided to get the Blue-Black 2 pack in size Large. The material is a light chiffon that provides enough coverage to let her feel comfortable without adding heavy layers. We live in Arizona, so adding a whole bunch more is less than desirable. The colors are nice, but not overwhelming (but we just got blue and black). The materials feel good so far. The chiffon is not opaque, so some color will come through the wraps, but it is pretty minimal. We will see how they do with some real wear and tear, but so far they look spectacular brand new. The size for the large is 74" long tip to tip and 18.5" wide through the body of the piece. The tie straps are 4" wide and are that for about 14" and then it rounds out to the 18.5". My wife is 5'4" 140 lb, and wears a medium in most clothing and the large ties well, it doesn't end up with a large gap from tying too far away from the thick part of the material. The runout after the tie is long enough to access easily but not too long to make it look poorly sized. I think she could have also gone with medium, but she wanted extra coverage just in case - which for a cover wrap is no problem.Really happy with them, she has a lot of blacks and blues in her swimsuit sets and they match well to pieces she has. Very pleased so far!

In prep for the summer and the swim lessons I plan to take. I have been on the hunt for attractive and comfortable swinware. When I spotted this two piece tankini I felt it would fit my needs. I ordered the black in a medium (US 8-10). However, the size I received was a small (US 4-6). Needless to say, the suit does not fit. I was able to shimmy into the panty bottom. This was possible even with me being 5'6, 150 lbs, because I am smaller on the bottom than on the top. I could not fit into the top. I measured the circumference of the waistband for the bottoms to be approximately 23 1/2". The widest area of the bottoms has a circumference of about 30". Due to the design of the straps, there is approximately 3 3/4" to adjust the straps to increase or decrease the length. The length of the tankini top is approximately 15 1/4" in the front and 12 1/2" in the back. The top has ruching on the sides, which helps to camaflodge the belly and sides. The fabric shell is 85% polyester and 15% elastane. The lining is 95% polyester and 5% elastane. The suite is wash and hang or lay flat to dry. I gave this two piece tankini suite 4 stars because I received the wrong size and was not able to fit into the top.

The length of the tankini top is approximately 15 1/4" in the front and 12 1/2" in the back. The top has ruching on the sides, which helps to camaflodge the belly and sides. The fabric shell is 85% polyester and 15% elastane. The lining is 95% polyester and 5% elastane. The suite is wash and hang or lay flat to dry. I gave this two piece tankini suite 4 stars because I received the wrong size and was not able to fit into the top.
Ordered a small and it fit great. I’m 101 lbs, 34d

Resumen: encubrimiento de verano aireado y versátil en un estilo de camisa que se puede usar dentro o fuera de la playa o piscina. Lo suficientemente grande como para sentirse suelto y relajado, pero no enorme y se ajusta a la talla. Materiales/Construcción: suelo ir por el algodón, pero este poliéster ligero se siente ventoso y suave. No hay quejas sobre la construcción. Fiel a las fotos de los productos. En los lados tienen hendiduras altas que dividen el encubrimiento en 2 paneles frontales y la parte posterior, que atrapará una brisa agradable, evita que se vea como una camisa súper larga con botones. Ajuste/tamaño: mido 5'1" de altura y pedí el tamaño pequeño de acuerdo con la tabla de tallas, y me quedo perfecto y cómo quería. Estoy contento con el ajuste, puedo abotonarlo, dejarlo abierto o incluso atarme en la cintura. Las hendiduras altas y el frente abierto permiten que se muestre más de mi cuerpo para que no me pierda en una camisa “sin forma”. Me encanta que las mangas puedan ser con pestañas hacia arriba o largas; ya que ayudan con el sol.

This is a lightweight swim coverup. It is Just enough to count as covered but still shows off a swimsuit. I like it. The garment is simple and comfortable, which is all you can ask for with a swim cover. It's made well and serves it's purpose, as expected. For reference: Female; 5'7" ; 130lbs ; Athletic/Active ; long torso ; small bust.

This is SO FLATTERING!! This is my first time in forever wearing a one piece (#mombod) and I wanted something that didn't make me feel old. I also didn't want something super risque considering I'm going to be chasing around a four year old in this. This fits the bill! I like that you can wear it with and without the straps and I actually feel like it'll stay up without the straps (surprisingly!) For reference, I'm 5'1" and around 115 lbs and I ordered a small.
